title: Social Media Content Creator - Construction Industry
description:
Social Media Content Creator



Sensor Studios | Remote Work

Full-time | 9am–5pm (Monday–Friday AEST)

Immediate start for the right candidate



Sensor Studios is a Sydney-based creative studio specialising in video, photography, and social media content for construction and building companies. We work closely with builders, trades, and construction brands to help them showcase their work and grow their presence online.



We’re looking for a Social Media Content Creator to join our team and take ownership of creating engaging, on-brand social content for our construction industry clients.



?



About the Role



You’ll be responsible for creating high-quality social media content that reflects the professionalism, craftsmanship, and detail of the construction companies we work with.



This is a hands-on role suited to someone who understands both social media and the construction/building industry, and who has a strong eye for detail across visuals and copy.



While we provide on-the-job training, this role is best suited to someone with prior experience in social media management and content creation.



We will provide you with edited photos and videos, you will then turn these into engaging social media posts with captions written. 



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Create engaging social media content for construction and building clients

 • Design social posts using Canva (primary tool)

 • Write clear, engaging captions tailored to the construction industry

 • Manage and schedule social media content

 • Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts

 • Work closely with our video and photography team to repurpose content

 • Ensure all content is accurate, polished, and aligned with client goals



?



Skills & Experience Required

 • Proven experience in social media management and caption writing

 • Strong Canva skills (essential)

 • Solid understanding of graphic design principles

 • Excellent written communication and copywriting skills

 • Experience working with construction or building industry clients (highly preferred)

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to follow brand guidelines

 • Ability to manage multiple clients and deadlines



Bonus (not essential):

 • Experience using Photoshop

 • Broader Adobe Creative Suite knowledge



?



Role Details

 • Hours: 9am–5pm, Monday to Friday

 • Location: Sydney, Australia (AEST)

 • Start Date: Immediate start available



?



Why Join Sensor Studios?

 • 3 weeks paid annual leave

 • Supportive, creative, and collaborative team environment

 • Ongoing training and skill development

 • Clear opportunity to grow within the company

 • Work with high-quality construction brands and projects



?



How to Apply (Important)



To be considered, your application must include:

 1. Examples or samples of your work (social posts, graphics, captions, etc.)

 2. Details of your experience working with construction or building industry clients

 3. A brief overview of your social media and graphic design experience

 4. Anything else you believe is relevant and shows why you’d be a great fit for Sensor Studios



?? Applications that do not include the above information will be automatically rejected.



?



If you’re passionate about social media, design, and creating content that showcases great construction work, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now – we’re ready to start the right person immediately.

title: Real Estate Videographer
description:
We're on the lookout for someone who wants to work on incredible projects and have their work seen by thousands of people everyday.



You will create viral social media reels of high end luxury homes, construction companies working on great projects and other videos which reach a large audience.



In order to be considered for this role you MUST have experience creating engaging social media reels using footage of homes and your portfolio must reflect this.



We don't work on the boring normal real estate house tours, we use trending music and high energy edits to bring these incredible homes to life.



A Few questions you must answer in order to be considered. Generic applications will be deleted and blocked. Failure to answer these questions will result in your application being ignored.

2. Do you edit on Premier Pro (If no, unfortunately please don't apply)

3. Do you have a computer that is capable of editing with high end effects and transitions

4. Do you have sufficiently fast and reliable internet to continually work on large projects.

5. Are you willing to continuously improve your editing skills and be part of a team that aims to dominate the local market?





If your portfolio doesn't showcase this type of work, you can apply to take part in a test edit. We will provide the footage and you can show what you are capable of editing.



About Us: We are Sydney's #1 choice for builders and construction companies to showcase their work. We are looking for editors to join our team who love creating viral videos. You will work as part of a supportive team who constantly drives each other to learn and excel at their jobs. If this sounds like you, please apply.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: AP & Bookkeeping Accountant
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Come join a dynamic, award-winning cloud technology consulting firm.



Are you detail-oriented, organized, and confident working with numbers? Do you enjoy keeping financial records accurate, clean, and reliable? If yes, we’d love to meet you.



We’re looking for a Junior Staff Accountant (AP & Bookkeeping) to support our finance operations and help keep our books accurate and up to date.



About itGenius:



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us:



Competitive Compensation & Bonuses



December Bonus

Performance Incentive Bonus

Annual Salary Increases

Time Off That Matters



Paid Leaves

Paid Philippine Holidays

Team & Culture



Annual Team Conferences & Events (travel, food, and accommodation covered)

People-first, remote-friendly culture

Career Growth



Training & Development Budget

Clear Career Growth Pathways

Benefits



Government-Mandated Benefits / HMO

Reports To: Senior Accountant



Job Overview:



As an AP & Bookkeeping Accountant, you are the bedrock of our financial data integrity. You are a key player on our “high-performing sports team,” ensuring that every transaction is recorded accurately and our suppliers are paid on time, which is fundamental to being a Trusted partner. Your diligent work in bookkeeping and accounts payable creates a Seamless operational foundation, allowing us to build Scalable financial processes. You are Empowered to maintain the accuracy of our books, which is the first step in providing the business with reliable financial intelligence.



Accountabilities



- Accurate Transactional Recording: Accountable for the accurate and timely processing of all accounts payable transactions and the maintenance of pristine bookkeeping records, ensuring the reliability of the general ledger.



Key Responsibilities:



- Process supplier invoices, ensuring proper coding, approval, and matching to purchase orders.

- Prepare and execute weekly payment runs for multiple currencies.

- Perform daily bookkeeping and bank reconciliation tasks.

- Proactively identify opportunities for process improvements in daily bookkeeping and accounts payable tasks to increase efficiency.

- Respond to supplier inquiries regarding payments and invoices.

- Assist with month-end closing procedures, including posting journal entries and preparing account reconciliations.

- Maintain organized and compliant financial records.



Required Qualifications & Skills:

- Education: Graduate of Accountancy or Finance related course

- Experience: At least 2–3 years of experience in accounts payable, bookkeeping, or a similar accounting role

- Accounts Payable (AP): Process supplier invoices, including proper coding, approval, and matching to purchase orders.

- Bookkeeping/GL: Perform daily bookkeeping tasks and maintain pristine records to ensure the reliability of the general ledger.

- Payments: Prepare and execute weekly payment runs for multiple currencies.

- Reconciliation: Perform bank reconciliation tasks.

- Month-End Support: Assist with month-end closing, including posting journal entries and preparing account reconciliations.

- Accuracy: Maintain a high level of accuracy and diligently follow established procedures (Scalable & Trusted behaviors).

- Ownership: Take complete ownership of assigned tasks to ensure they are completed accurately and on time (Empowered behavior).

- Efficiency: Proactively identify opportunities for process improvements and learn quickly (Ingenius behavior).

- Compliance: Maintain organized and compliant financial records.



It would be nice if you have:

- Experience with cloud-based accounting systems (Xero, QuickBooks, etc.)

- Experience working in a remote setup

- Knowledge of Google Workspace

- Basic understanding of multi-currency transactions



Work Schedule & Setup:

- Full-time, permanent

- 8-hour shift | Morning shift

- Monday to Friday (Weekends off)

- Philippine holidays observed

- Permanent Work From Home



You’ll Thrive Here If You’re Interested In:

- Cloud-based tools and modern ways of working

- Supporting small businesses (1–30 employees)

- Using technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Marketing Project Manager (Growth Ops)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Mission: Helping Small Businesses Scale through Technology



At itGenius, we believe technology is the ultimate multiplier for growth. As a premier Google Workspace partner, we’ve spent 15 years helping over 5,000 business owners transition from startup chaos to scalable, efficient operations with Google Workspace and other cloud tools.



We are currently building a global, high-volume, systems-first consultancy. To achieve this, we need a Marketing Project Manager who views marketing as an engineering challenge—focusing on building the “pipes” that drive consistent, global growth.



The Role: Strategic Execution & Workflow Management

We prioritize data-driven execution over traditional marketing “fluff.”



Reporting directly to the Chief of Growth, your role is to bridge the gap between high-level strategy and tactical output. You won’t be managing a large internal team; instead, you will orchestrate a network of specialist contractors and automated systems to ensure our organic growth engine—primarily driven by our high-authority YouTube channel—is running at peak performance.



? Why Join Our High-Performance Team?

We offer a remote-first culture that values systems, clarity, and measurable results.



Work From Anywhere: Permanent work-from-home (aligned with Philippine Time).

Clear Career Growth: Budget for professional certifications and a defined path toward senior leadership.

Performance-Based Rewards: A monthly success bonus tied directly to the achievement of your KPIs.

Dynamic Culture: Annual team conferences (past locations include Boracay) and a focus on holistic well-being.

Comprehensive Benefits: Competitive compensation, health allowances, and tech support for your home office.





Core Responsibilities

You will oversee the marketing portfolio, ensuring every project is clearly defined, properly resourced, and delivered on schedule.



1. Content Strategy & Production Management: Direct our external editors and copywriters. Your task is to ensure all content aligns with our brand voice—the “Calm Expert Guide”—and effectively solves real-world business problems for our audience.

2. Growth Research & Competitive Analysis: Oversee our YouTube and search research process. You will identify high-demand topics and work with creatives to package them into high-performing titles and thumbnails.

3. Customer Lifecycle & Marketing Automation: Manage and optimize the customer journey within our CRM (Intercom). You will build and refine automated nurture sequences that guide prospects through our service tiers.

4. Technical SEO Coordination: Collaborate with our Engineering team to ensure our web properties remain healthy, crawlable, and optimized for the next generation of AI-driven search.

5. Performance Analytics: You will monitor and validate marketing KPIs bi-weekly, providing actionable insights during our Growth Sync meetings to improve ROI across all organic channels.





Who You Are (Fit & Mindset)

We look for candidates who demonstrate high ownership and a systems-first approach to problem-solving.



The “Systems Thinker”: You fundamentally understand B2B marketing funnels and how to manage complex workflows in a remote, international environment.

The “Tech-Savvy Professional”: You are comfortable navigating new tools, directing technical implementations, and taking absolute accountability for project outcomes.

The “Accountable Executor”: You are a power-user of project management tools (Asana preferred). You can write clear, “fail-proof” creative briefs and keep multiple contractors moving toward a single goal.





Required Qualifications

- 5+ Years in Marketing Operations or Project Management: Preferably within a B2B, SaaS, or tech consulting environment.

- Contractor Management: Proven experience sourcing, briefing, and holding external freelancers accountable for quality and deadlines.

- Tool Proficiency: Strong experience with Asana (or similar), CRM automation platforms, and an understanding of YouTube/Search analytics.

- Communication Excellence: You bring solutions, not just problems, and communicate with clarity and professionalism.





Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift, Philippine Time but flexible as some team are based in Europe.

- Monday to Friday (Weekends off).





Are You Ready to Scale with Us?

If you’re ready to build a scalable marketing machine that delivers tangible business impact, we’d love to meet you.



Apply Now and tell us: Which specific marketing system or workflow have you built that you are most proud of?

title: Senior Account Manager
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Come join our dynamic, award-winning cloud technology consulting firm!



Are you passionate about empowering small businesses to achieve their greatest potential through technology? 



We’re looking for a Senior Account Manager to be the trusted partner for our clients, driving retention, satisfaction, and revenue growth. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and making a real impact, this is your chance to shine.



We’re itGenius, a leading cloud technology consulting firm and Google’s top partner in Australia. For over a decade, we’ve helped small and mid-sized businesses across the globe transform how they work with Google Workspace, AI, and automation. Our business model combines consulting expertise with scalable managed services that empower modern teams to do their best work.



If you're an A-player—apply now!



Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



Competitive Compensation & Bonuses:

- December Bonus

- Performance Incentive Bonus

- Annual Salary Increases



Time Off That Matters:

- Paid Leaves

- Paid National/Local Holidays



Work & Life Experiences You'll Remember:

- Annual Team Conferences & Events (travel, food, accommodation covered)



Investing in Your Growth:

- Training & Development Budget

- Career Growth Pathways



Support to Help You Thrive:

- Government-Mandated Benefits/ HMO





Reports To: Head of Sales & Accounts



Job Overview: 



As a Senior Account Manager, you will be at the forefront of this mission, acting as a trusted partner and strategic advisor to our valued clients.



You will be instrumental in ensuring their continued success, identifying opportunities for them to leverage technology more effectively. This role is about building lasting relationships, driving mutual growth, and ensuring our clients experience the "Amazon Prime" of IT service - effortless, responsive and world class. 



You will be directly accountable for client retention, satisfaction, and the growth of your assigned accounts, contributing significantly to itGenius's 10-year goal of becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services to the SMB market.



Accountabilities



The Senior Account Manager is specifically accountable for the following measurable objectives within their assigned client portfolio:



Holding the Game Plan: Accountable for holding a clients long term objectives and ensuring the plan is constantly moved forward over time via quarterly reviews.



Strategic Client Partnership: Holding strategic relationships with key decision-makers within assigned client accounts, positioning itGenius as a trusted technology partner.



Client Retention & Satisfaction: Accountable for maintaining high levels of client satisfaction and ensuring the retention of assigned client accounts.



Revenue Growth: Accountable for identifying and securing opportunities for revenue growth through upsell and cross-sell within their assigned client portfolio.





Key Responsibilities:



To achieve the above accountabilities, the Senior Account Manager will perform the following day-to-day activities:



Relationship Management: Proactively engage with assigned clients through regular meetings (virtual and in-person where appropriate), calls, and
 communications to understand their evolving business needs and technology landscape.



Needs Assessment & Solution Proposal: Conduct thorough needs analyses to identify client challenges and opportunities, and present tailored IT solutions and services that align with their strategic objectives and our service offerings.



Sales & Negotiation: Prepare and deliver proposals, negotiate contracts, and manage the sales cycle for upsell and cross-sell opportunities within existing accounts to achieve revenue targets.



Client Advocacy & Issue Resolution: Act as the primary point of contact for assigned clients, advocating for their needs internally and collaborating with the technical, support, and project teams to ensure timely and effective resolution of any issues or escalations.



Account Planning & Review: Develop and maintain comprehensive account plans for each assigned client, including key contacts, service history, future opportunities, and conduct regular business reviews to demonstrate value and align on future strategies.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate and up-to-date client information, communication logs, and sales pipeline data within the CRM system. Prepare and present regular reports on account health, sales performance, and client satisfaction to the Head of Strategic Sales.



Tea
ntoring: Serve as a subject matter expert and mentor to Junior Account Managers and Sales Representatives, assisting in their professional development and contributing to team best practices.



Market Awareness: Stay informed about industry trends, technological advancements, and the competitive landscape to better advise clients and identify new opportunities.





Required Qualifications & Skills



Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, IT, or related field

5–8+ years in account management, sales, or client services, ideally in IT/technology/SaaS. 

Proven track record in client retention, revenue growth, and account expansion.

Client Relationship & Strategy: Build trusted partnerships with senior decision-makers. Develop account plans, conduct business reviews, and identify growth opportunities.

Sales & Solution Selling: Skilled in proposal creation, contract negotiation, upsell/cross-sell, and delivering tailored IT solutions.

Communication & Collaboration: Excellent verbal and written skills; adept at presenting to executives and working seamlessly with internal teams.

CRM & Reporting: Proficient in CRM tools for tracking accounts, pipeline management, and reporting on KPIs.

Leadership & Mentoring: Mentor junior account managers and contribute to process improvements.

Behavioral Competencies: Proactive, innovative, accountable, collaborative, and trusted.





Work Schedule



8-hour shift

Morning shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:



The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Admin & Customer Support (Dumpster Rental Business)
description:
Job Title: Admin & Customer Support (Dumpster Rental Business)



Job Overview



We are seeking a reliable, customer-focused Admin & Customer Support to provide full front-office support for a local U.S.-based dumpster rental company. This role is critical in handling daily administrative operations, inbound customer communication, sales coordination, and scheduling so the business owner can step out of day-to-day tasks and focus on growth.



The ideal candidate will act as an office manager and customer support representative, confidently handling inbound calls, booking rentals, coordinating with drivers, and managing billing and CRM updates. Strong English communication, organization, and comfort handling customer inquiries and sales conversations are essential.



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Key Responsibilities



-Customer Communication & Sales Support

-Answer inbound customer calls (primary responsibility)

-Return missed calls and respond to voi
s promptly

-Respond to text messages,
s, and website inquiries

-Clearly explain dumpster pricing, rental terms, weight limits, and company policies

-Handle basic objections and confidently close bookings

-Maintain professional, friendly, and helpful phone presence at all times





Sales & Quote Management



-Create and send quotes via CRM,
, or text

-Follow up on open quotes (same-day and 24-hour follow-ups)

-Re-engage old leads and past inquiries

-Reach out to previous customers to generate repeat business

-Track lead sources and booking conversions (as applicable)



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Operations & Scheduling Coordination



-Schedule dumpster drop-offs and pickups

-Coordinate daily schedules with the driver

-Confirm next-day jobs with customers

-Update and maintain the driver route sheet

-Ensure smooth communication between customers and drivers

-Keep job calendar accurate and up to date



Billing & Administrative Tasks



-Send invoices to customers

-Collect payments (if system access allows)

-Track unpaid invoices and follow up consistently

-Update CRM or spreadsheets with job details

-Maintain a clean, accurate, and organized customer database

-Ensure all job and customer records are properly documented

-Light Marketing & Online Support (Optional / Preferred)

-Post basic content on
 and Instagram

-Respond to social media messages and comments

-Assist with sending review requests

-Help manage and respond to Google Business messages



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Required Qualifications



-Strong spoken and written English (clear phone communication is critical)

-Comfortable handling inbound sales and customer service calls

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Experience supporting service-based businesses (home services, construction, logistics preferred)

-Comfortable using CRM systems, Google Sheets, calendars, and scheduling tools

-Proactive, reliable, and confident when speaking with customers

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment





Preferred Qualifications



-Experience in dumpster rental, home services, or logistics-based businesses

-Previous virtual assistant or office manager experience

-Familiarity with invoicing, payment tracking, and customer follow-ups

-Basic social media management experience (FB/IG)



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:

title: Administrative Assistant & Social Media Scheduler
description:
Employment Type: Full-Time, Remote



Hours: Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:30 PM (Australian time), with 30 minute lunch break (unpaid)



Salary: $700 AUD per fortnight.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Perform general administrative tasks to support daily operations.

 • Schedule social media posts using Meta Business Suite and GoHighLevel, ensuring existing content is organized and posted on time.

 • Maintain and manage the social media content calendar, ensuring accurate scheduling and timely delivery.

 • Manage invoicing, subscriptions, and client billing using Xero with precision.

 • Ensure all tasks—whether scheduling or administrative—are carried out with strong attention to detail.



Requirements:

 • Experience in administrative roles with a systematic, organized approach.

 • Hands-on experience scheduling (not creating) content via Meta Business Suite and GoHighLevel.

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to follow pre-planned content schedules accurately.

 • Familiarity with Xero for managing invoicing and subscriptions.

 • Excellent communication and self-management skills in a remote setting.



If you thrive in organising schedules, managing details, and balancing admin tasks, we’re excited to meet you!



Please detail your experience and why you think you would be suitable for this role. Generic copy/pasted responses will be deleted.

title: AI Voice Automation Architect
description:
We are building a structured, logic-driven AI voice system for a rental company.



The goal is to design a voice agent that can:



Interpret natural language during live phone calls

Apply structured decision logic in real time

Normalize human input into defined equipment categories

Trigger conditional workflows

Update CRM data dynamically

Return structured responses for downstream processes

Maintain conversational flow while staying within strict logical boundaries



The system must separate conversational behavior from decision logic and data handling.



Our current setup includes:



GHL (AI Voice Agent + Custom Actions)

Workflow automation tools (Make)

Webhooks and structured API integrations

CRM-based data modeling

JSON-based response handling



We are looking for someone that is comfortable designing and implementing:



Logic-heavy automation systems

Conditional routing and structured decision trees

Webhook-based normalization layers

CRM-integrated data workflows

Structured JSON return handling

Guardrails to prevent repetition, hallucination, and logic drift

Clear separation between conversational logic and system logic



Experience with voice AI systems is strongly preferred.

title: Senior Paid Media Specialist (Google + Meta) — Part-Time — Remote
description:

Supportive team, clear processes, zero micromanagement





Hiring process



1 Intro call

2 Short practical exercise (paid)

3 Final interview

title: Senior Google Ads Technical Specialist
description:
Google Technical Specialist (Backend & Tracking)

Reports To: Google Technical Lead

Remote | Full Time



Growth Huntr is a performance-driven eCommerce agency scaling brands across AU & US.

We are hiring a Google Technical Specialist to support our Google Technical Lead in maintaining tracking accuracy, Merchant Center health, and backend account integrity across multiple eCommerce brands.

This is a high-level technical execution role, not a strategy-only or campaign-building position.

Role Overview

You will be responsible for ensuring all Google accounts are technically sound, scalable, and compliant.

You will handle technical issues. 



Core Responsibilities:

Tracking & Tagging

Implement and validate GA4 ecommerce tracking





Deploy and troubleshoot Google Ads conversion tags





Work inside Google Tag Manager (GTM)





Diagnose discrepancies (Shopify vs GA4 vs Google Ads)





Support Enhanced Conversions setup





Merchant Center & Feed Management

Monitor product diagnostics and disapprovals





Resolve incorrect price / availability mismatches





Support feed rule implementation





Maintain SKU health and compliance





Assist with suspension investigations





Performance Max & Account Hygiene

Validate listing group structures





Monitor asset group segmentation





Check conversion settings and attribution windows





Review change history for anomalies





Support MCC-level structure consistency





Troubleshooting & Escalations

Investigate tracking failures





Diagnose sudden performance drops





Resolve feed integration breakdowns





Prepare technical summaries before escalation





 Required Experience

3+ years Google Ads experience (eCommerce focus)





Strong Merchant Center knowledge





Advanced GTM & GA4 implementation

We are assessing:

Technical depth

This role requires real backend capability, not theoretical knowledge.



Success Metrics

Ideal Candidate

 me your video application if you feel up to the task:

title: ???? Full-Stack Developer (Contract / Gig – 20+ hrs per week)
description:
About AppBox

AppBox builds custom client portals, CRM systems, and workflow automation tools for small to medium-sized businesses.

Our projects are lean, fast-moving, and practical — typically delivered in 2–4 weeks per build. We focus on clean UI, scalable backend structure, and smart automation rather than overengineered systems.



Role Overview

We are looking for a practical, execution-focused Full-Stack Developer to join us on a short-term contract while our core team is unavailable.

You’ll be responsible for taking projects from prototype to production using our existing stack and workflows.

There is enough work for at least one month (20+ hrs/week), with potential to extend depending on performance and project flow.



???? Our Tech Stack



Lovable – rapid prototyping & validation

Next.js – production frontend

Cursor – AI-assisted dev workflow

Supabase – backend (auth, database, edge functions)

REST APIs & third-party integrations



What You’ll Be Doing

* Turning Lovable prototypes into clean, production-ready Next.js apps

* Building frontend UI components with structured, scalable architecture

* Implementing Supabase database schema, auth, and row-level security

* Creating CRUD systems (clients, orders, invoices, users, etc.)

* Connecting APIs and third-party integrations

* Deploying and managing production environments

* Maintaining clean Git version control practices

* Working independently with minimal supervision



Typical Projects

- Client portals (login, dashboard, document uploads, status tracking)

- Basic CRM systems (contacts, orders, pipeline tracking)

- Quote request systems

- Simple admin dashboards

- Workflow automation builds



Projects are usually completed within 2–4 weeks.



Ideal Candidate

You are:

- Highly practical and delivery-focused

- Comfortable working independently

- Strong in Next.js (App Router preferred)

- Confident with Supabase (auth, DB, RLS policies)

- Familiar with AI-assisted development tools like Cursor

- Experienced with small business SaaS builds

- Able to move quickly without sacrificing code quality

title: Hospice Receptionist/ Office Coordinator
description:
Hospice Receptionist / Office Coordinator — Full-Time

at White Orchid Hospice

Position Summary

White Orchid Hospice is seeking a compassionate, highly organized Hospice Receptionist/Office Coordinator who delivers excellent customer service and maintains a consistently warm, professional phone presence. This full-time role is central to daily office operations and includes coordinating Durable Medical Equipment (DME) and medical supply orders, tracking requests, and ensuring timely follow-up with patients, clinicians, vendors, and referral s. White Orchid Hospice provides specialized end-of-life comfort care to patients and families across the Texas and Oklahoma areas. 

Who We Are

White Orchid Hospice’s goal is to provide quality specialized palliative and end-of-life care and support to patients and those important to them. 

Work Schedule

This is a full-time position supporting office operations during business hours (office hours are listed as Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM). 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities (What You’ll Do)

Reception & Customer Experience

• Serve as the first point of contact for patients, families, caregivers, referral s, and vendors—creating a welcoming and helpful experience every time.

• Answer and route incoming calls with a friendly, calm, professional phone voice, using excellent etiquette and discretion.

• Take accurate messages, prioritize urgency appropriately, and ensure follow-through until resolution.

DME & Medical Supply Coordination

• Order, coordinate, and track DME and patient medical supplies based on clinician and patient needs.

• Communicate with DME/supply vendors to confirm order details, delivery timelines, backorders, and pickups as needed.

• Maintain clear documentation/logs of orders, deliveries, and open items to ensure continuity and timely support.

Follow-Up & Office Coordination

• Follow up on patient and clinician requests (e.g., supplies, equipment needs, general coordination items) and close the loop with all involved parties.

• Support communication with referral s (as needed) in a professional, service-oriented manner.

• Assist with general office coordination tasks such as managing shared inboxes, light scheduling support, scanning/faxing, and maintaining organized records (as assigned).

________________________________________

Qualifications

Required

• Demonstrated customer service strength and professional phone communication skills.

• High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities with frequent interruptions.

• Comfort communicating with diverse groups (patients/families, clinicians, vendors, referral s).

• Proficiency with common office tools 
, phone systems, basic spreadsheets, document management).

Preferred

• Experience in hospice, home health, healthcare administration, or medical office coordination.

• Familiarity with DME ordering workflows and/or medical supply coordination.

• Experience working in an EMR/EHR and maintaining accurate documentation.

________________________________________

Key Skills & Attributes for Success

• Warmth, empathy, and professionalism with patients and families

• Clear communication and strong follow-through

• Calm under pressure; able to triage and prioritize requests appropriately

• Team-first mindset and a solutions-oriented approach

title: Property Management Associate, Full Time Remote
description:
JSFG Investments, LLC is looking for a highly motivated Junior Property Management Associate to join our fast-growing property management team. This is a hands-on role where you’ll learn the business from the ground up—we provide training and mentorship to help you succeed. You’ll be involved in leasing, accounting support, rent collections, maintenance coordination, and daily operations across a diverse portfolio of commercial and residential properties. Working directly with experienced managers, you’ll play an active role in improving tenant experience, increasing revenue, and maximizing asset value. We offer competitive compensation and benefits, along with meaningful opportunities for professional growth within a vertically integrated investment firm.

Work Schedule:

Saturday  to  Wednesday | 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

Time zone: Eastern Standard Time

Tasks:

Real Estate Tasks

o Leasing, rental collections, onboarding and KPI reporting.

o Monitor leases that are about to expire and support the renewal process.

o Monitor Open Tasks (pending or follow-up tasks in Buildium).

o Coordinate with residents and vendors for maintenance requests.

o Onboard new properties onto Buildium.

o Onboard new residents including background checks (Move-in Process).

o Manage Move Ins, Move Outs, including Evictions (Move-out Process).

Accounting and Bookkeeping.

o Reconcile Bank & Credit Card Statements.

o Create Bills related to repairs for units.

o Monitor accounts payable and receivables (rent collection and utility expenses).

o Generate monthly Income Statement and Balance Sheet Statements.

o Check quotes for a yearly insurance policy (Insurance Tracking).

o Generate disbursement and rental owner statements

o Generate annual 1099 Tax Forms

o Manage late rental payments



Regulation & Ad hoc Projects

o Communicate with local authorities on lease renewals, notices, violations and other topics.

o Monitor changes in local regulation quarterly.

o Track changes in Section 8 subsidies and other Housing Authority programs.

Requirement

o Fluent in English.

o 0-3 years of professional work experience, ideally in the property management space.

o Tech-savvy with strong practical experience in MS Word and MS Excel.

o Impeccable attention to details related to but not limited to Accounting & Bookkeeping Tasks.

o Honest, open-minded, respectful, independent and team focused.

o Multitasker with excellent communication skills.

o Work well under pressure and independently to complete ad hoc requests.

o Basic knowledge of Zillow, Apartments.com and real estate websites for leads.

Preference

o Fluent in Spanish or Mandarin.

o Knowledge of MS Excel Visual Basic for Applications.

o Experienced and trained in web development (specific to layout and web tool usage).

o Knowledge and experience of Buildium and Quickbooks.

o Proficiency in MS PowerPoint and MS Access.

o Work experience with a Property Management company.

o At least 1 years work with the same employer in the past.

Tools:

o Buildium, Quickbooks, MS Office Suite, Multiple Listing Service, RingCentral, Gmail, Google Workspace, and other applications as required.

title: Senior VA / Team Lead — Music Distribution Project Manager
description:
Salary: $700–800/month (full-time, 1-month contract with possible extension)

Job Description:

We are a music production company uploading 1,200 albums (36,000 tracks) across 20 music distribution platforms (DistroKid, Symphonic, TuneCore, CD Baby, etc.) within 30 days.

You will lead a team of 2 junior VAs. All metadata (titles, descriptions, genres, credits) will be pre-generated in spreadsheets. Your job is execution and quality control.

Responsibilities:



Create and manage accounts on 20 distribution platforms

Train and oversee 2 junior VAs on upload workflows per platform

QC every upload for metadata accuracy before submission

Report daily progress (albums completed per platform)

Troubleshoot upload errors and platform-specific issues

Maintain a master tracking spreadsheet



Requirements:



Experience with at least 2 music distribution platforms (DistroKid, TuneCore, CD Baby, etc.)

Excellent attention to detail

Strong English communication

Able to start immediately

Reliable internet and own computer



To apply, include the word "METADATA" in your application so I know you read this.

title: Junior VA — Music Distribution Upload Specialist (2 positions)
description:
Salary: $400–500/month (full-time, 1-month contract with possible extension)

Job Description:

We need 2 VAs to upload music albums to distribution platforms. All metadata will be provided in spreadsheets — you copy/paste and upload audio files. A team lead will train you and check your work.

Responsibilities:



Upload albums to assigned platforms following step-by-step checklists

Copy metadata from spreadsheets into platform fields

Upload audio files (WAV format)

Flag any errors or issues to team lead

Hit daily upload targets (~8-10 albums/day)



Requirements:



Fast, accurate data entry

Comfortable learning new web platforms quickly

Reliable internet and own computer

Available full-time for 30 days starting immediately



To apply, include the word "UPLOAD" in your application so I know you read this.

title: Marketing Director (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced, strategic, and execution-driven Marketing Director to lead and manage all digital marketing initiatives for a fast-growing organization.



This is not a content assistant role. This is a leadership position responsible for brand strategy, digital growth, online engagement, and measurable performance.



If you are creative, analytical, AI-proficient, and obsessed with high-quality output — we want to talk to you.



Position Overview



The Marketing Director will oversee and execute all online marketing efforts, including social media strategy, video production, content creation, branding, website management, reputation management, and audience engagement.



You must be able to think strategically and execute at a high level.



Key Responsibilities



Lead and manage all social media platforms (Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)



Develop and execute high-level marketing strategy



Create, oversee, and publish high-quality branded content



Video editing and short-form/long-form content production



Graphic design and visual brand consistency



Website updates and maintenance



Monitor and manage Google reviews and online reputation



Drive online engagement and audience growth



Implement AI tools to improve marketing efficiency and performance



Track analytics and report measurable results (engagement, traffic, conversions, ROI)



Maintain brand voice, tone, and visual identity across all platforms



Required Experience



5+ years of digital marketing experience



3+ years in a leadership or director-level role



Proven track record of growing online presence and engagement



Strong portfolio of video, graphics, and social media campaigns



Experience managing websites (WordPress or similar platforms preferred)



Proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.)



Graphic design proficiency (Canva, Adobe Suite, etc.)



Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, automation tools, content optimization platforms)



Strong understanding of SEO, Google reviews management, and branding strategy



Skills & Qualities



Strategic thinker with execution ability



High attention to detail



Strong branding instinct



Creative but data-driven



Self-motivated and accountable (remote role)



Excellent written and visual communication skills



Highly organized and deadline-oriented



Performance Expectations



Consistent, high-quality posting schedule



Growth in followers and engagement



Increased website traffic and conversions



Improved brand positioning and visibility



Strong online reputation management



Compensation



Competitive salary based on experience.

Performance-based bonuses available.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Resume



Portfolio (social media, video, graphics, campaigns)



Examples of measurable growth results you’ve achieved



Brief statement explaining why you are the right fit for this role

title: Recruiter
description:
I am looking for an experienced Recruiter. This role requires someone who has solid talent acquisition experience and can manage end-to-end recruitment for a wide range of roles across different industries. You’ll partner directly with leadership and collaborate closely with fellow recruiters and the client success team to deliver high-quality candidates and a smooth hiring process.



Responsibilities:

• Manage full-cycle recruitment: sourcing, screening, interviewing, assessments, client endorsement, and job offer coordination.

• Recruit for a wide range of positions across various industries and functional areas.

• Communicate with clients to understand role requirements, clarify expectations, and provide recruitment updates.

• Coordinate candidate interviews, availability, and follow-ups.

• Build and maintain talent pipelines for recurring and hard-to-fill roles.

• Use multiple sourcing channels, job boards, and Boolean search strategies to attract qualified candidates.

• Prepare candidate profiles and other necessary files for endorsement.

• Work closely with the client success team to ensure strong employer–candidate alignment.

• Maintain accurate documentation, candidate records, trackers, and reporting tools.

• Contribute ideas to improve internal recruitment processes, systems, and hiring strategies.



Qualifications:

• Minimum 3 years of experience in end-to-end recruitment, preferably within a virtual staffing or BPO/RPO environment.

• Proven end-to-end recruitment experience, handling multiple roles across different industries.

• Strong client communication and client management skills, preferably foreign clients.

• Experienced in candidate coordination and managing high-volume pipelines.

• Solid background in sourcing through job portals, social media, databases, referrals, and Boolean search techniques.

• Tech-savvy and able to use ATS tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms efficiently.

• Comfortable working independently while collaborating with a distributed team.

• Strong attention to detail, time management, and ability to meet deadlines.

• Ability to work full-time within US business hours (Pacific/Mountain time).



Apply here:

title: Accounting Specialist - US Nonprofit experience required
description:
The Operations Manager is the operational backbone of our organization. This role owns the administrative, financial, and people operations that keep the organization running smoothly and compliantly day to day.

This is a fast-paced, execution-heavy role best suited for someone who thrives in complexity, enjoys managing multiple priorities at once, and brings precision and structure to everything they touch. The Operations Manager will project-manage workflows across up to four organizations simultaneously, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and follow-through without sacrificing speed.



The ideal candidate finds genuine satisfaction in creating order, maintaining flawless internal systems, and enabling leadership and program teams to move quickly and confidently.



Key Responsibilities



Financial & Administrative Operations

• Manage all accounts payable and accounts receivable, ensuring accurate coding, documentation, and timely processing

• Track expenditures with precision and support grant-related financial oversight

• Assist the COO in monitoring budgets and ensuring fiscal responsibility

• Prepare and maintain operational and financial reports as needed



Vendor, Contract & Compliance Management

• Oversee vendor relationships, contracts, renewals, and procurement processes

• Liaise with professional service providers including PEO, accounting, audit, legal, and IT vendors

• Ensure ongoing compliance with nonprofit, legal, regulatory, and internal policy standards

• Regularly review and refine policies and procedures to ensure clarity, adoption, and efficiency



People Operations (Remote)

• Own the full employee lifecycle including hiring coordination, onboarding, offboarding, and documentation

• Manage the organization’s PEO relationship and ensure compliance for a distributed team

• Maintain organized personnel records and ensure policies are clearly communicated and followed

• Support a positive, well-structured remote work environment aligned with organizational values



Systems, Tech & Process Optimization

• Manage the tech stack, including software subscriptions, permissions, and standard usage

• Audit workflows to identify inefficiencies and implement process improvements

• Use technology and AI tools to automate tasks, reduce manual work, and eliminate operational friction

• Proactively identify and mitigate cybersecurity risks



Cross-Functional & Project Management

• Project-manage operational workflows across multiple initiatives and partner organizations

• Coordinate closely with program managers to assess operational needs and support program delivery

• Serve as a reliable internal point of coordination, ensuring stakeholders stay aligned and informed



Top Skills & Competencies

• Exceptional Attention to Detail: Consistently accurate across financial operations, contracts, and compliance

• Strong Project Management: Ability to manage multiple workstreams and organizations simultaneously

• Systems & AI Optimization: Comfort auditing workflows and leveraging modern tools to improve efficiency

• Nonprofit Financial Stewardship: Experience with budgeting, grant tracking, and regulatory compliance

• Remote People Operations: Proven ability to manage hiring, onboarding, and PEO partnerships



Dream Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment and brings calm, structure, and organization to complex operational landscapes. They are highly detail-oriented, organized, and dependable, with the ability to juggle competing priorities while maintaining flawless execution.

This person:

• Is energized by managing multiple organizations and projects at once

• Works quickly without sacrificing accuracy or quality

• Proactively identifies issues and resolves them before they escalate

• Takes pride in behind-the-scenes work that enables others to perform at their best

• Values accountability, consistency, and operational excellence

 

Operations Management, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Bookkeeping, Project Management, Compliance, Vendor Management, HR/People Operations, Onboarding, Process Improvement, AI Tools, Nonprofit, Grant Management, PEO, Budget Management, Remote Team Management



EXPERIENCE LEVEL

Experienced (3+ years)

title: Account Manager (Remote)
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote



Experience Level: Entry-Level (preferred 1 yr experience with mortgage broker, real estate, escrow or lending company)



Job Description

Account Managers will work closely with our underwriting team, AE sales team and broker client partners to manage timelines, organize complete and legible documentation and maintain accurate records. This role is ideal for fresh graduates or individuals new to the mortgage industry who are eager to learn and grow.



Key Responsibilities

Assist brokers/loan processors with collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documentation

Successfully coordinate with brokers/processors and multiple internal operations departments thru various stages of the loan process from submission to funding

Communicate with brokers, processors and third-party vendors to obtain missing items

Upload and manage files in our loan origination system

Maintain accurate records and ensure compliance with company guidelines

Perform data entry, status updates, and basic administrative tasks

Support communication between the processing, underwriting, and sales teams on current updates and status reviews for the file

Strengthen existing client relations between Account Executives and Broker Partners



Preferred Qualifications

· Bachelor’s degree in Finance or related fields

· Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

· Excellent written and verbal English communication

· Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment

· Basic proficiency with Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

· Willingness to learn US mortgage processes (training will be provided)



Requirements

Dual monitors

High speed internet

back up data plan in the event internet connection is down



Nice to Have

· Experience in BPO, admin work, or customer service

· Familiarity with US mortgage terms (not required)



Work Schedule

· Full-time

· US time zone (EST/PST depending on team assignment)



Why Join Us?

· Opportunity to enter the US mortgage industry with full training

· Work with a supportive, growing team

· Career advancement opportunities

· Stable, long-term remote role



How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY-

Please send the LINK of your resume with the subject line: Account Manager – Your Name

Include a brief introduction and your soonest availability.

title: Doc Drawer (US Mortgage Company | Full-Time | Night Shift | Remote)
description:
Work Setup: 100% Remote (Work From Home)

Schedule: Monday to Friday | Night Shift (U.S. Pacific Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time | Long-Term Position



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Doc Drawer to join our growing operations team.



Your main responsibility is to prepare and generate accurate loan documents before closing. This is a critical position — errors in documentation can delay loan closings, so we are looking for someone who is highly detail-oriented and reliable.



If you are organized, focused, and serious about building a long-term career in the U.S. mortgage industry, this role is for you.



Fresh graduates are welcome to apply. Applicants with 1–2 years of U.S. mortgage experience are strongly preferred.



Training will be provided to the right candidate.



Key Responsibilities:

> Prepare and generate initial and closing loan documents

> Review loan approvals prior to document generation

> Verify borrower information, loan terms, fees, and rates

> Ensure documents meet compliance and investor guidelines

> Coordinate with processors, underwriters, and closing team

> Maintain internal tracking and documentation accuracy

> Ensure loan packages are complete before release



Qualifications

> Extremely detail-oriented (this is non-negotiable)

> Strong organizational and time management skills

> Good written English communication

> Basic to intermediate skills in Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

> Stable internet connection and quiet home workspace

> Willing to work night shift (PST schedule)

> Able to work independently without constant supervision



Preferred but Not Required

> Experience in U.S. mortgage (doc drawing, processing, closing, underwriting)

> Familiarity with mortgage disclosures and closing documents

> Experience working in a remote setup



What We Offer

> Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

> Stable, long-term position

> Monday–Friday work only (Weekends off)

> Growth opportunity in the U.S. mortgage industry

> Professional and supportive work environment



>> IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered:

1. Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph

2. Include a DIRECT LINK to your resume (Google Drive / OneDrive / Dropbox)

3. Make sure the link is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

4. Include the word “DOCREADY” at the top of your application message



Applications without a resume link

Applications without the keyword “DOCREADY”

Resume links that require permission



? Will be automatically rejected.



We only review applicants who follow instructions. Attention to detail starts with your application.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Reels / TikTok) – Fast Turnaround – Long-Term Role
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing apparel and custom print company based in the U.S. We create daily short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Our videos focus on product showcases, behind-the-scenes production, educational clips, and trend-style content.



We are looking for a skilled video editor  who understands social media pacing and trends.



What We Need



• Edit 5–8 short-form videos per week

• Add engaging captions (burned-in subtitles)

• Strong hooks in the first 1–2 seconds

• Fast pacing, clean cuts

• Add music and trending sounds when needed

• Deliver within 24–48 hours



Videos are typically 15–45 seconds.



You MUST Have



• Experience editing Reels / TikToks / Shorts

• Understanding of retention and hook structure

• Fast turnaround time

• Strong English comprehension

• Reliable internet

• Attention to detail



If you edit wedding videos or cinematic YouTube vlogs, this role is NOT for you.



We are looking for someone who understands short-form viral content.



Software



CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar.

(You must be comfortable working fast.)



How to Apply

To apply, send:

3–5 examples of short-form videos you edited

What software you use

How long it takes you to edit a 30-second Reel

Your internet speed (screenshot required)

Type the word “DTFREADY” at the top of your application so we know you read everything

Applications without the keyword will be ignored.



This is a fast-paced role. We value speed, quality, and consistency.



If you are serious about long-term work and growth, apply now.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***



Digital Reach is a global HubSpot Platinum Partner agency providing complete digital solutions across the cloud and the entire customer journey.



As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will be instrumental in the successful execution, optimization, and analysis of our clients' digital marketing campaigns. This role is ideal for someone with 2-4 years of experience in paid ad management across search engine marketing (SEM), Meta, and LinkedIn and who thrives in a fast-paced agency environment. In this role, you’ll be collaborating with seasoned professionals and will work closely with your Marketing Consultant and Campaign Director.



You will assist in the analysis and optimization of accounts, provide strategic guidance, and contribute to budget allocation decisions. You will be a major contributor to sophisticated multi-channel marketing initiatives across platforms such as Meta, LinkedIn, Google, Bing, and OTT/CTV, where responsibilities will also include ensuring that all campaign assets are in place, coordinating with various tea
mbers to meet project deadlines, and maintaining comprehensive records of all campaign-related activities.



Role & Responsibilities

- Analyze campaigns at the pre-defined cadence, suggest optimizations, and ensure updates are documented appropriately. Continuously analyze campaign data, uncover insights, and translate them into recommendations to optimize performance.

- Offer strategic input and budget allocation suggestions.

- Collaborate with the Campaign Director to carry out campaign builds and optimizations. Ensure all campaign assets are implemented in-platform and prepared for final internal quality control (QC checks).

- Assist in preparing and updating client reporting decks in coordination with the Marketing Operations team and Marketing Consultant. 

- Work with the Campaign Director to create and refine target audiences in collaboration with various vendors (eg. Bombora, Simplifi, etc.). 

- Develop a strong conceptual understanding of each client’s business model, marketing objectives, and campaign strategy, and demonstrate the ability to shift between accounts with different goals (e.g., lead generation vs. brand awareness) while optimizing tactics accordingly.

- Manage campaign experiments, from setup to tracking results.

- Regularly monitor campaigns to ensure full-funnel execution post-launch. 

- Check ad platforms at predefined cadences to ensure budget spending aligns with expectations and troubleshoot issues as needed.

- Facilitate communication between internal teams to ensure all deadlines are met, and campaign needs are addressed. 

- Maintain clear documentation of optimizations, suggestions, and feedback.

- Troubleshoot and resolve platform errors and recommendations with the Campaign Director.



Candidates Must Have:

- 2-4 years of in-platform digital marketing optimization experience, preferably in an agency setting.

- Experience with LinkedIn, Meta, and DSP platforms, including proficiency in display ads.

- Experience working in HubSpot or similar marketing automation platforms.

- Familiarity with Google Ads and SEO/SEM principles.

- Experience with various marketing automation tasks, such as list building, workflow building, form building, etc.

- Experience with reporting and analysis tools, including building reports and presenting insights.

- Strong optimization skills and attention to detail.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to multitask and manage multiple assignments in a fast-paced environment.

- Proven ability to work both independently and collaboratively.



Bonus Points If You Have: Agency experience.



This Position Reports To: Campaign Director



Working Hours: This is a remote-only position working US business hours. Applicants must be available to work either a graveyard shift (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM PH time) or a bridge shift (3:00 AM – 12:00 NN PH time).



You Should Know: This isn’t the place for everyone. You’ll have a lot of autonomy, but the expectations are high, the work is fast-paced, and the hats are many. We’re looking for people with grit who take ownership, see the big picture, and are always thinking about how we can do even better the next time.



Compensation and Benefits: Digital Reach offers a competitive salary for this role, depending on location and experience. You’ll also receive a benefits package which could include up to 6 weeks of PTO (including sick leave, holidays, and time off for vacation, etc.) depending on your location.



Timeline: Applicants who pass the initial screen can expect video screening questions and initial behavioral/cognitive testing within a week of submitting your application. We are hiring for this position for an immediate start but will adjust the timeline for the right candidate.



Additional Information: If you read this job description and think that you might be a good fit, even if you don’t meet all of the requirements, please go ahead and apply. We aim to create opportunities for marginalized populations and communities and are willing to train for this role.





Digital Reach provides equal employment opportunity to all employees and applicants without regard to race, religion, age, ancestry, gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, veteran status, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.





***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***

title: Virtual Assistant Needed – WordPress Webpage Build (2 Pages: B2B + Consumer)
description:

title: Virtual Medical Assist  /  Scribe  ?
Full Stack Developer - High Salary - Immediate Start
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Philippines-based candidates preferred)

Type: Full-time

Compensation: $2,500 USD/month

Start Date: Immediate

Time Zone: Pacific Time Zone business hours overlap



About the Opportunity



We're building a portfolio of AI-powered business automation tools targeting SMBs and mid-market companies. Our current pipeline includes projects like:



- Local Business SEO Automation Tool - Automate Google Business Profile management and review responses

- Restaurant Inventory & Waste Management System - AI-powered demand forecasting and waste reduction

- Team Knowledge Base with AI Retrieval - Slack/Teams integrated knowledge management with LLM search

- Content Repurposing Tool - Automatically transform content across multiple formats and platforms



You'll be working directly with the founder to rapidly prototype and launch these tools, with the goal of achieving product-market fit and scaling successful products.



What You'll Build



Immediate Projects (First 30 days):

- MVP development for 1-2 core products from our validated idea pipeline

- Integration with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude) for AI-powered features

- Modern web applications with clean, responsive interfaces

- Database design and API development for multi-tenant SaaS products



Ongoing Responsibilities:

- Feature development based on user feedback and market validation

- Performance optimization and scaling preparations

- Testing, debugging, and maintaining code quality

- Direct collaboration with founder on product strategy and technical decisions



Required Experience



Must Have:

- 3+ years professional full stack development experience

- Strong proficiency with modern JavaScript/TypeScript

- Experience with React, Node.js, and database design (PostgreSQL/MongoDB)

- Previous work with REST APIs and third-party integrations

- Active GitHub profile with recent, high-quality code samples

- Proven ability to work independently and deliver complete features

- Excellent English communication skills

- Reliable internet and professional development setup



Highly Preferred:

- Experience building SaaS applications or business tools

- Previous work with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

- Knowledge of prompt engineering and AI application development

- Experience with modern deployment (Docker, AWS/GCP, CI/CD)

- Understanding of subscription billing and user management systems



Our Tech Stack



Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

Backend: Node.js, Express, Python (FastAPI for AI features), BaaS (Supabase, Firebase)

Database: PostgreSQL (Sequelize ORM), MongoDB, Redis for caching

AI/ML: OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, GCP Vertex AI, LangChain

Cloud & hosting: AWS, GCP, Azure, Netlify

DevOps: Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Azure DevOps

Collaboration: Slack, Linear, GitHub, Figma



What Makes This Role Unique



- Direct impact: You'll be the primary developer building products from concept to launch

- AI focus: Work extensively with cutting-edge LLM technology and prompt engineering

- Market validation: Build products with validated demand and clear revenue potential

- Growth opportunity: Successful products will scale rapidly with potential for equity/profit sharing

- Learning environment: Work directly with an experienced founder in a fast-paced startup environment



Application Requirements



Your application MUST include:



1. GitHub Profile Link - We will thoroughly review your code quality, project structure, and commit history

2. 2-3 Repository Examples - Your best full stack projects (ensure repos are public or provide access)

3. Live Demo Links - Working applications we can test (preferred but not required)

4. AI/LLM Experience - Brief summary of any relevant AI projects or API integrations

5. Availability Confirmation - Confirm you can start immediately and work PST business hours



Compensation & Benefits



- $2,500 USD/month paid monthly via international transfer

- Fully remote work with flexible schedule within PST hours

- Direct collaboration with founder - your ideas and input are valued

- Opportunity for increased compensation based on product success

- Potential equity/profit sharing for successful product launches



Next Steps



We're looking to hire immediately. Strong applications will receive a response within 2-3 business days.



Interview Process:

1. Application review and GitHub code review

2. Initial interview call (30 minutes)

3. Paid test project

4. Final interview

5. Start date and offer to start



Ready to build the future of business automation? Send your application today.



Applications missing GitHub links will not be reviewed. We prioritize candidates who can demonstrate their coding ability through real projects and clean, well-documented code.

title: Residential Building Estimator (Day-job)
description:

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Philippine Time

• Buildxact

• Xero

• Advanced Excel

• Issue RFQs to trades

• Keep documentation clean and organized



We Are Looking For Someone Who

• Takes ownership of their work

• Your experience with Buildxact and Excel

• Your expected hourly rate



Only serious applicants should apply.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

* Work Hours: Availability from 9 AM to 6 PM US CST, Monday–Friday

* Reliable Technology: Stable internet connection (min. 25 Mbps down/up) and a dedicated computer

* Hubstaff Usage: Mandatory time-tracking and productivity monitoring via Hubstaff

* Video Meetings: Cameras must remain on for all video calls

* Full-Time Focus: This is a full-time role; no simultaneous employment with other clients or employers



Buzz Digital Agency is seeking a dedicated GoHighLevel Automation & Integrations Specialist to join our fully remote team in the Philippines. You will architect, deploy, and maintain complex automations that power our clients’ marketing funnels and internal workflows. This role is critical to ensuring seamless data flows, on-time campaign launches, and high deliverability across SMS,
, and voice channels.



If you’re passionate about automation, have a knack for problem-solving, and thrive in a fast-paced digital-marketing environment, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities

* GoHighLevel Sub-Account Management: End-to-end setup and maintenance of client sub-accounts, including custom domain configuration and SMS/phone A2P registration

* Automation Design & Implementation: Build, test, and deploy automated workflows using n8n, 
, and Zapier to streamline lead capture, follow-up sequences, and data syncing

* API Integration & Logic Flow: Develop and maintain robust integrations via APIs; design clear logic flows and process maps for complex automation scenarios

* Ongoing Monitoring & Optimization: Regularly audit existing automations and integrations for performance, security, and accuracy; implement improvements as needed

* Documentation & Training: Create and update technical documentation; train internal tea
mbers and clients on platform features and best practices

* Troubleshooting & Support: Serve as the escalation point for any automation failures or platform outages; resolve issues swiftly to minimize downtime



Additional best-practice responsibilities:

* Conduct quarterly platform health checks and provide performance reports

* Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to align automations with campaign objectives

* Research and pilot emerging automation tools and techniques



Qualifications

* Experience: 3+ years in marketing automation or system integration roles, with demonstrated expertise on GoHighLevel

* Technical Skills:

* Advanced proficiency with n8n and 
 for workflow automation

* Strong API development/integration experience (RESTful services, webhooks)

* Solid understanding of domain DNS, SSL, and SMS/A2P registration processes

* Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving, clear written and verbal English communication, and strong documentation practices

* Tools: Comfortable using Hubstaff (or equivalent), Slack/Teams, and project-management platforms

title: GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA)
description:
About SiteIntel™ Feasibility

SiteIntel™ Feasibility is an AI + GIS SaaS platform transforming how commercial real-estate developers evaluate property sites.

Our mission is simple: make professional-grade feasibility accessible, auditable, and instant.

 We’re an early-stage, pre-revenue startup built on Supabase, 
v, and TypeScript, serving the next generation of builders and investors.



Role Overview

We’re seeking a GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA) to help build and maintain SiteIntel’s data backbone.

 You’ll work directly with our founder and developer to integrate geospatial APIs, normalize public datasets, and ensure report data is accurate, current, and consistent.

 If you enjoy working with real-world mapping data, APIs, and automation in a fast-moving startup, this role offers real ownership and visible impact.



Key Responsibilities

Retrieve and normalize geospatial datasets via APIs (ArcGIS, FEMA NFHL, TxDOT, USFWS, Census).



Join and clean parcel, zoning, flood, and infrastructure layers for site analyses.



Perform data QA on AI-generated JSON reports — flagging missing or inconsistent records.



Maintain dataset refresh logs (metadata, timestamps, and API endpoints).



Convert and format spatial data (GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV) for ingestion into Supabase.



Test API endpoints and record response quality or rate-limit issues.



Collaborate with the developer to refine Supabase schema and storage.



Generate quick QA overlays or maps in QGIS / ArcGIS Pro to validate results.



Document workflows in Notion and maintain reproducible processes for scaling.







Required Skills & Experience

2 + years’ experience with ArcGIS / QGIS or other GIS platforms.



Familiarity with ArcGIS REST APIs or similar spatial-data endpoints.



Proficiency in data cleaning and joins (Excel, CSV, GeoJSON).



Basic SQL or Postgres queries for attribute filtering and spatial validation.



Understanding of spatial relationships (buffer, intersect, overlay).



Strong analytical mindset and eye for detail — you notice when data doesn’t line up.



Excellent communication skills (English 4 + stars) and documentation discipline.







Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience with Supabase, Python / Node.js data scripts, or REST automation.



Familiarity with open datasets such as FEMA NFHL, TxDOT Traffic, USFWS Wetlands, or Census TIGER.



Exposure to AI / LLM data QA pipelines.



Comfortable using Notion, ClickUp, or GitHub for workflow management.









Why Join SiteIntel™

Work with real GIS and open data powering a live SaaS product.



See your datasets feed directly into AI-generated commercial-feasibility reports.



Learn how AI, GIS, and automation intersect in a modern data workflow.



Contribute to a product that makes professional feasibility accessible worldwide.



Enjoy flexible remote hours, direct collaboration with the founder, and startup growth potential.







How to Apply

Please visit this link: 

Fill out the form and we will get back to you shortly after reviewing your application. 



Applications without sample work or API experience will not be considered.



Thank you.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Sales Manager (Remote – Philippines)



Company: Buzz Digital Agency



Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Please review carefully before applying.

This is a full-time, remote position requiring:

- Work Hours: Availability from 9 AM – 6 PM US CST, Monday through Friday.

- Reliable Technology: Stable high-speed internet connection and a functional computer/laptop.

- Hubstaff Usage: You will be required to use Hubstaff for time tracking, productivity monitoring, and reporting.

- Video Meetings: Cameras must be on during all team and client video meetings.

- Full-Time Focus: This is a full-time role; no side jobs or multiple employments are allowed.



About Us

Buzz Digital Agency is a dynamic, results-driven digital marketing company focused on delivering innovative and impactful solutions. We specialize in helping businesses grow through SEO, PPC, social media, and digital strategy.

We’re seeking an experienced and motivated Sales Manager to lead our growing sales team and drive business growth. If you have a passion for sales, leadership, and digital marketing—and thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment—this opportunity is for you.



Role Overview

As our Sales Manager, you’ll lead and inspire a small but ambitious sales team, strategize to expand our client base, and ensure we exceed revenue goals. You’ll work directly with the Managing Partner and collaborate with marketing and operations to ensure seamless execution and client satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead & Motivate: Mentor the sales team to achieve individual and team goals, providing training and performance feedback.

- Sales Strategy & Execution: Develop and execute sales strategies to acquire new business, expand existing accounts, and drive revenue growth.

- Client Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers, deliver tailored digital solutions, and ensure client satisfaction.

- CRM & Pipeline Management: Oversee the sales pipeline, ensuring leads are tracked and followed through in the CRM (GoHighLevel.).

- Collaboration: Work closely with marketing to align lead generation campaigns with sales efforts and optimize conversion.

- Performance Metrics & Reporting: Track key sales metrics, generate performance reports, and recommend improvements to leadership.

- Process Optimization: Continuously refine sales processes and workflows for better efficiency and conversion.



Required Qualifications & Skills

- 3–5 years of proven B2B sales experience (preferably in digital marketing, SaaS, or advertising services).

- Demonstrated leadership or team management experience.

- Excellent English communication and presentation skills.

- Strong understanding of digital marketing services (SEO, PPC, social media, etc.).

- Proficient with CRM systems and Hubstaff (or similar time-tracking tools).

- High level of accountability, organization, and self-motivation in a remote setup.



Why Join Buzz Digital Agency?

- Work directly with senior leadership and make a measurable impact on company growth.

- Be part of a creative, results-oriented, and collaborative remote team.

- Uncapped earning potential through commissions and bonuses.

- Long-term career growth opportunities in a rapidly expanding digital agency.





To apply, please fill out this application form:
