title: Home Health Case Manager
description:
Are you looking for a remote position in the medical field where you can assist patients from your own home? If you are interested in working with a talented clinician staff to grow your career in the medical field, apply to Tender. The Case Manager is responsible for ensuring coordination of care for our home health patients. This includes coordinating visits, following up with clinicians, clinical problem solving, and ensuring quality of care.



Tender Home Health is a young and forward-thinking company that focuses on our employees. We focus on career development, work life balance and a dynamic company culture.



Our Dynamic Culture



We know that our staff is the life blood of our agency. We are dedicated to ensuring that our staff has the opportunities for the career path they desire. To support our staff, we have a gratitude culture where we constantly celebrate our associates’ achievements. This is evident in our many rewards and recognition practices.



Here are some examples of methods we developed to keep our close knit culture:

• Fun, innovative ways to highlight the teams’ successes

• Team oriented bonuses

• Familial atmosphere where we would like to know your life outside of Tender and share it with the team



We also do not shy away from hard work and grit. We are very upfront with critical feedback, as we want all of our tea
mbers to grow in their careers. We constantly mentor our staff to develop key skills that can be utilized beyond our company. Whether it be for 1 year or 20 years, during your stay at Tender, we will ensure you learn behaviors that you will utilize in any other endeavors.



Life is short, strive for excellence.



Qualifications



Required:

• Registered Nurse

• Proficient with computers and applications: Microsoft Office Suites, Google Applications, etc.

• Comfortable with Medical Records and Medical Terminology

• Knowledge of medical documentation

• Strong Interpersonal skills interview new clinicians

• Ability to virtually train new clinicians

• Detailed oriented

• Demonstrates a "growth mindset," with a proactive attitude towards learning and improving skills, coupled with a strong sense of personal responsibility and initiative in achieving goals.

• Ability to work PST hours 9am - 6pm



Desired:

• OASIS experience

• Experience in Home Health

• Experience in medical quality assurance

• Experience with medical electronic documentation



Your Day to Day Activities



The RN Case Manager will assist case managers to plan, organize and direct home health care services.



Specific activities include:

• Perform chart audits on an ongoing basis to verify correctness, completeness, and conformance to standards

• Regularly re-evaluates patient nursing needs

• Review the care plan, which establishes goals based on nursing diagnosis and incorporates therapeutic, preventive, and rehabilitative nursing actions

• Interview and train new clinicians

• Work with clinical staff to correct issues

• Document common issues to prevent future clinical errors

• Communicate with the physician regarding the patient’s needs and reports any changes in the patient’s condition; obtains/receives physician’s orders as required



Compensation

• $800 per month plus additional bonus incentives



Serious candidates only. If you want to apply, send an
 to 
 and in the subject put "Case Manager". Also attach your resume and send 2-3 sentences about why you feel you are the best person for the position.

title: AI & Automation Specialist
description:
PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We are not building another traditional brokerage.



We are building a company powered by systems, automation, AI, and intelligent infrastructure — designed to scale across markets without breaking under growth.



We believe the future of business is not manual.



It is automated.

It is intelligent.

It is context-aware.

It compounds over time.



As we expand, the systems behind the company must become smarter, not heavier.



And that’s where you come in.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: AI Automation & GoHighLevel Specialist

Location: Remote

Role Type: Flexible

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+



We believe exceptional builders deserve exceptional compensation. For the right person who can architect intelligent automation that truly reduces manual workload and strengthens operations, we are willing to pay premium for capability and execution.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity



This is not a basic automation setup role.



This is about building intelligent infrastructure.



You won’t just connect triggers and actions.



You’ll design how AI interacts with real business workflows.

You’ll map logic trees that determine how issues are routed.

You’ll structure systems that reduce manual friction.

You’ll help build automation that actually replaces repetitive processes.



As the company grows, automation becomes more critical — not less.



And the person who builds that system grows with it.



If you’ve been implementing automations but want to design smarter, deeper systems — this is that step.



If you want your work to power real operational scale — not just marketing funnels — this will feel meaningful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We’re Building



We are building AI-driven automation systems using:



• GoHighLevel (GHL)

• AI Voice Agents (within GoHighLevel)

• CRM automation workflows

• Ticketing logic

• Custom fields & conditional logic

•
 notification systems

• Conditional routing workflows

• Systemble (for outbound automation support)

Agentic AI

• Time tracking tools



The vision is simple:



A call comes in ?

AI answers ?

Information is structured ?

Tickets are created or updated ?

Departments are notified ?

Escalations trigger automatically ?

AI references stored context when the customer calls back.



Less back-and-forth.

More intelligence.

More scalability.



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You’ll Be Doing



You will work directly with leadership to:



• Build and refine AI voice agents inside GoHighLevel

• Improve AI note capture and CRM integration

• Automate ticket creation and dynamic ticket updates

• Design routing logic (issue type ? correct department)

• Create escalation workflows for complex scenarios

• Set up automated notifications triggered by call outcomes

• Implement custom field logic to track fulfillment stages

• Enable AI to reference stored CRM data in follow-up conversations

• Build outbound AI call workflows (where regionally permitted)

• Map full automation architecture from first interaction to resolution



You won’t just implement steps.



You’ll design how the system thinks.



Who This Role Is Built For



Someone who understands automation beyond surface level.



Someone who thinks in workflows, logic trees, and decision paths.



Someone who sees inefficiencies and immediately imagines a smarter system.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Required Experience:

• GoHighLevel (GHL)

• AI voice agent setup

• CRM automation workflows

• Custom fields and conditional logic

• Ticketing systems

•
 automation

• Inbound and outbound call workflows

title: Quality Assurance Supervisor - Home Health
description:
Is Tender for you?

Are you looking for a challenging position in the medical field? If you are interested in getting acclimated into the medical industry by reviewing detailed clinical records then apply to Tender Home Health.

If you are interested in a competitive salary, medical benefits, bonuses and career growth, apply now. Tender Home Health is a young, energetic company that values the growth of each of our tea
mbers. The Medical Quality Assurance (QA) Assistant Lead oversee a talented QA team, ensuring Medicare home health charts are accurate, compliant, and ready for billing.

Our Dynamic Culture

We know that our staff is the life blood of our agency. We are dedicated to ensuring that our staff has the opportunities for the career path they desire. This is evident in our many rewards and recognition practices.

Here are some examples of methods we developed to keep culture:

? Career Growth – We invest in all our employees with defined goals and upward mobility. There is no set time for promotion, each tea
mber can get promoted once they achieve goals.

? Bonuses – Monthly individual and team-oriented bonuses.

? Benefits – Paid Time Off, Medical Benefits and Holidays.

We also do not shy away from hard work and grit. We are very upfront with critical feedback, as we want all of our tea
mbers to grow in their careers. We constantly mentor our staff to develop key skills that can be utilized beyond our company. Whether it be for 1 year or 20 years, during your stay at Tender, we will ensure you learn behaviors that you will utilize in any other endeavors.

Life is short, strive for excellence.

Qualifications

Required:

• Active RN, LVN/LPN license

• Minimum 2 years experience in the Home Health Quality Assurance

• Strong knowledge of Medicare guidelines, PDGM, and regulatory compliance

• Proficient with computers and applications: Microsoft Office Suites, Google Applications, etc.

• Tech Savvy – ability to learn new systems including Electronic Medical Systems

• Demonstrates a "growth mindset," with a proactive attitude towards learning and improving skills, coupled with a strong sense of personal responsibility and initiative in achieving goals.

• Supervisory experience – managing, training and developing a team

• Ability to work PST time 9am-6pm

Desired:

• HCS-D or BCHH-C certification (Home Health-specific coding credentials)

• Experience with WellSky

• Previous Medicare billing experience

Your Day to Day Activities

QA Specialist will review medical records to ensure they are complete and accurate. To achieve this, QA must be detailed oriented and work closely with the clinical staff.

Specific activities include:

• Lead and manage the QA team to achieve accuracy and productivity targets.

• Prepare daily work assignments, review reports, and track progress.

• Review and audit Medicare home health charts for compliance and completeness.

• Apply ICD-10 coding and ensure documentation supports billing requirements.

• Maintain records of recurring issues for staff training and process improvement.

• Collaborate with the clinical team to address chart deficiencies.

• Submit Medicare claims and monitor for accuracy.

• Conduct reimbursement optimization reviews to ensure accurate coding of primary and comorbid conditions that impact case mix weight and PDGM payment calculation.

• Identify and correct coding errors, inconsistencies, or missing information in patient records.

• Monitor regulatory updates and ensure the agency remains compliant with Medicare, Medicaid, and payer requirements.

• Research and resolve Medicare rejections, appeal low reimbursements, and implement process improvements.

• Learn (or apply your knowledge of) Medicare billing processes, including claim submission and error prevention.



Benefits:

• Opportunities for promotion

• Paid training

• Pay raise

• Work from home

• Quarterly bonus opportunities



Compensation

• $850 per month plus additional bonus incentives



Serious candidates only. If you want to apply, send an
 to 
 and cc 
 in the subject put "QA Assistant Lead". Also attach your resume and send 2-3 sentences about why you feel you are the best person for the position.

title: Scrappy B2B Growth Marketer to Get Us to $1K MRR
description:
Hi! I'm Debbie, CEO of Pineway: an AI-powered platform helping coaches replace 6+ tools with one system.



We have:

- 700+ coaches on our waitlist

- 28 beta users with 61% weekly activation

- A product that works and is almost ready to ship

- Zero revenue (yet)



I need someone to help us turn that waitlist into our first paying customers.



Not in 6 months. In 6 weeks.



If you're scrappy, understand early-stage startups, and know how to make $1 from $0, I want to meet you like yesterday.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Waitlist Activation

- Wake up 700 coaches who signed up but haven't heard from us

- Write re-engagement
s that get opens, clicks, and replies

- Test subject lines, CTAs, and messaging until something works

- Drive waitlist to beta user to paying customer conversions



 Marketing & Nurture

- Build simple sequences that move people from "interested" to "ready to buy"

- Write weekly
s that educate, build trust, and drive action

- A/B test everything: subject lines, CTAs, send times

- Report on what's working (open rates, clicks, conversions)



Revenue Experiments

- Run scrappy growth experiments to find our first $1K MRR

- Examples: limited-time early access offers, founder-led outreach, referral programs, webinars, 1:1 demos

- Track what drives signups and revenue

- Double down on what works, kill what doesn't



Performance & Reporting

- Weekly report: what we tested, what worked, what we're doing next

- Bring recommendations, not just data

- Help us understand what to scale and what to cut



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Month 1: First re-engagement
 sent, beta signups increasing, first revenue experiment running



Month 2: First paying customers ($1K MRR), clear understanding of what converts



Month 3: Repeatable playbook for turning waitlist into revenue ($5K MRR)





YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF



- You've worked with early-stage startups (pre-revenue or <$10K MRR)

- You've helped a product get its first paying customers

- You understand
 marketing with real metrics to back it up (open rates, click rates, conversions)

- You can write compelling copy that drives action

- You're comfortable with scrappy experiments and fast iteration

- You don't need a playbook — you BUILD the playbook

- Bonus: You've worked with coaches, consultants, or SaaS tools for service businesses





YOU'RE NOT A FIT IF



- You've only worked at big companies with big budgets

- You need detailed processes and playbooks handed to you

- You think "growth" means running
 ads with a $10K budget

- You can't show me examples where your work directly drove revenue

- You're looking for a stable, predictable role (this is startup chaos)





WHAT YOU'LL GET



- $1,500-2,000 USD/month (based on experience)

- Raises tied to revenue milestones (when you hit $1K, $5K, $10K MRR, you get raises)

- Fully remote

- Work directly with me (CEO) — no layers, fast decisions

- Early equity when you transition to full-time

- Own the growth function from day one





HOW TO APPLY



If you've read this far, here's what I need to see:



1. Record a 3-minute Loom video covering:

- Who you are and what you've worked on

- One specific example where you helped a startup get its first customers (show me the numbers)

- How you'd approach converting Pineway's 700-person waitlist into paying customers

- What excites you about working with a scrappy, pre-revenue team



2. Write the opening paragraph of a re-engagement
 to 700 coaches who signed up for our waitlist but haven't heard from us in a while (Visit 
 first to understand what we do)



3. Pitch me one scrappy growth experiment we could run in the next 2 weeks to drive our first $500 in revenue



If you're the right person, I can't wait to meet you.



Talk soon!



Debbie

description:
GENERAL CONTEXT

.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ EVERYTHING BEFORE APPLYING



Hours: 3 to 6 hours daily

Schedule: Flexible, must overlap at times with Ireland and Arizona (USA) hours

Starting Rate: $4.00 USD per hour

Increase to $4.50 USD per hour after 60 days

Performance raises of $0.25 USD every 6 to 12 months



We are looking for a dedicated and reliable Executive Assistant to support a CEO managing multiple growing brands in real estate media and wellness.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and to become part of a supportive, family-style team. We are not looking for temporary freelancers. We want someone who is career-minded and ready to grow with us.



The CEO is based in Ireland and also works Arizona, USA hours at times. Some flexibility with time zones is important.



Brands You’ll Support:

A-Zing Realty Media (U.S.-based real estate media company)

Root Theory Wellness

Bare Standard Skin Hair Body

Bare Standard Wellness

Bare Bandia Beauty



Key Responsibilities:

-
 Management (High Priority Task)

• Monitor inbox every 30 minutes during your shift

• Identify urgent
s

• Flag priority messages

• Draft responses based on training provided

• Send replies on behalf of the CEO when instructed

• Forward
s to the correct departments

• Learn the CEO’s tone and communication style



- Administrative Support

• Conduct online research

• Create and manage spreadsheets

• Organize information and digital files

• Assist with communication between departments



- Creative & Social Media Support

• Help create simple flyers

• Research social media trends

• Suggest content ideas

• Assist with optimizing posts and engagement



We are looking for someone who:

• Has strong written English skills

• Is highly organized and time-efficient

• Checks details carefully

• Is not afraid to ask questions

• Takes initiative instead of waiting for instructions

• Is honest, transparent, and dependable

• Completes tasks within appropriate timeframes

• Wants long-term stability and growth



This role requires someone who can learn how the CEO thinks and eventually anticipate needs. The goal is to build trust and grow together over time.



We operate in a family-style environment. We communicate openly throughout the day. We value respect, but we are not overly formal. No need for “ma’am” or “sir.” We care more about results, teamwork, and integrity.



Important - We are looking for someone who:

• Tracks their time accurately

• Does not overextend tasks beyond reasonable timelines

• Communicates clearly about workload

• Is motivated by growth, not short-term pay



If you are dependable, proactive, and looking for a long-term opportunity with room to grow, we would love to hear from you.

title: Homecare Administrative and Billing Coordinator
description:
Position Summary



The Homecare Administrative and Billing Coordinator provides comprehensive

administrative, billing, and documentation support to ensure efficient and compliant

home health care operations. The position plays a critical role in maintaining accurate

patient records, supporting revenue cycle processes, improving documentation quality,

and ensuring regulatory compliance.

This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to

collaborate effectively with clinical and administrative teams.

Key Responsibilities

1. Administrative Support

? Provide general administrative support to the Home Health Care team.

? Manage patient intake documentation and maintain organized patient files.

? Schedule appointments and coordinate communication between patients,

caregivers, and clinicians.

? Prepare reports, correspondence, and internal memos.

? Maintain confidential patient records in compliance with HIPAA and other

regulatory standards.

? Support onboarding of new staff by organizing documentation and compliance

files.

? Assist with audits and accreditation preparation.

2. Billing and Revenue Cycle Support

? Prepare and submit insurance claims (Medicare, Medicaid, private insurers).

? Verify patient eligibility and benefits prior to service delivery.

? Track billing submissions and follow up on denied or unpaid claims.

? Coordinate with billing departments and insurance companies to resolve

discrepancies.

? Maintain accurate billing records and ensure compliance with reimbursement

guidelines.

? Assist in reconciling payments and generating financial reports.

? Support prior authorization and documentation requirements.

3. Documentation Improvement Support

? Review clinical documentation for completeness and accuracy.

? Ensure documentation aligns with billing requirements and payer regulations.

? Collaborate with clinicians to clarify incomplete or inconsistent records.

? Support implementation of documentation best practices and templates.

? Assist in quality improvement initiatives related to charting and compliance.

? Monitor documentation turnaround times and compliance metrics.

     Prepare documentation reports for management review.





Qualifications:

Education

?Associate or Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare Administration, Business

Administration, Health Information Management, or related field preferred.

?Equivalent work experience may be considered.



Experience

- 2+ years of experience in home health care, healthcare administration, or medical billing.

- Experience with electronic health record (EHR) systems.

- Knowledge of Medicare/Medicaid billing requirements preferred.



Skills and Competencies

? Strong organizational and time management skills.

? Knowledge of medical terminology and healthcare documentation standards.

? Familiarity with HIPAA and healthcare compliance regulations.

? Proficiency in Microsoft Office and healthcare billing software.

? Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

? High attention to detail and problem-solving ability.

? Ability to handle sensitive information with discretion.



Preferred Qualifications

? Certified Medical Billing Specialist (CMBS) or similar certification.

? Experience in home health regulatory compliance.

? Experience supporting quality improvement initiatives.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

? Accuracy rate of billing submissions.

? Claim denial rate reduction.

? Documentation compliance percentage.

? Timeliness of administrative processing.

? Audit findings and corrective action implementation.

title: Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator
description:
Job Description:

As a Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator, you will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth operation of our construction projects by managing the procurement process. Your responsibilities will include:



1. Creating Submittal Logs: Develop and maintain comprehensive submittal logs to track the submission and approval of all project-related documents.

2. Creating Work Orders: Generate accurate and detailed work orders for subcontractors and suppliers, ensuring all necessary information is included.

3. Creating RFI Logs: Maintain a detailed Request for Information (RFI) log, ensuring all queries and responses are accurately recorded and communicated.

4. Creating Cabinet and Shop Drawings: 

5. Vendor Management: Identify, evaluate, and manage relationships with suppliers and subcontractors to ensure the timely delivery of high-quality materials and services.

6. Cost Management: Monitor and control project costs by negotiating favorable terms with suppliers, managing budgets, and ensuring cost-effective procurement practices.

7. Inventory Management: Oversee the inventory of construction materials and equipment, ensuring adequate stock levels and minimizing waste.

8. Compliance and Documentation: Ensure all procurement activities comply with relevant regulations and standards. Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and documentation.

9. Collaboration: Work closely with project managers, site superintendents, engineers, and other tea ---------- mbers to align procurement activities with project timelines and requirements.

10. Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities to improve procurement processes and implement best practices to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.

11. Highly efficient at taking notes during meeting.



Requirements:

- A bachelor’s degree in engineering, architecture, supply chain management, or a similar field is preferred.

- Minimum of 4 years experience in the construction industry.

- Proven experience in construction coordination or a related role.

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy to ensure there are no mistakes in procurement activities.

- Strong organizational and time-management skills.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills. Must be fluent in English (verbal and written).

- Proficiency in procurement software and tools.

- In-depth knowledge of construction materials, equipment, and industry standards.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.



PLEASE READ & FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS:

If you're ready to take the next step in your construction career, we want to hear from you! To apply, don’t forget to follow these steps:

1.
 with 'HIRE ME - CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator' in the subject line and send to " 

2. Attach your updated Resume/CV in PDF format, detailing your work history.

3. Include a portfolio showcasing your work.

4. Record a one-minute Intro Video addressed to WBC, highlighting your background, skills, and relevant experiences.

5. Provide contact information for 2 professional references, including their Full Names, Job Positions, Relationships, working Philippine contact numbers, Date and Time of Availability.



Please be advised that only candidates who have submitted the specified requirements will be considered in this position.

title: Crypto BD Partner - $10,000+ Potential in 90 Days
description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Senior AWS Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Junior Underwriting Analyst (Tier 1 – Risk)
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring a Junior Underwriting Analyst to assemble complete, accurate, and well-organized underwriting packages for senior risk leadership and the Credit Risk Management Committee.



This is a documentation-heavy, detail-critical role focused on financial statement review, data verification, and underwriting package preparation — not final credit decision-making (at this stage).



Core Responsibilities



Collect and organize underwriting documentation (12–24 months financials, bank data, tax returns, A/R & A/P aging)



Review and interpret balance sheets, P&Ls, and cash flow statements



Calculate and verify key metrics (Revenue growth, EBITDA, Contribution Margin, Debt ratios, Cash runway, ROAS, CAC/LTV)



Ensure data completeness across bank integrations and financial systems



Assemble clean underwriting packets using standardized templates



Coordinate with Account Executives to obtain missing documents



Track package status in CRM tools



Non-Negotiable Requirements



Applicants must have ALL of the following:



? 3–5 years of experience in fintech, banking, or credit card industry

? Direct underwriting or credit analysis experience

? Experience reviewing borrower financials in a lending context

? Working knowledge of risk ratings, credit limits, KYC/KYB, and lending compliance



Candidates from general accounting, audit, or corporate finance backgrounds without credit underwriting experience will not be considered.



Ideal Background



E-commerce lending, merchant cash advance, business credit card, or commercial credit



Familiarity with ROAS, CAC, LTV, and contribution margin



Experience using fintech tools and CRM systems



What We’re Looking For



Highly detail-oriented and process-driven



Strong financial statement literacy



Proactive communicator



Comfortable in a structured support role




 your resume to

title: Junior Integration Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a motivated Junior Integration Specialist to join our Managed Service Provider (MSP) team. In this role, you won't just manage one system, you will be the "bridge builder" for our diverse portfolio of business clients, helping to connect their various software platforms so their data flows seamlessly.

 

This is a client-facing technical role designed for someone who understands system logic and is eager to master enterprise-level tools like Boomi, Salesforce, and Power Automate across multiple different client environments. You will work under the guidance of senior specialists to build, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated "pipes" that keep our clients' businesses running efficiently.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client Integration Monitoring & Support

   - Monitor daily integration logs across multiple client environments to ensure data is syncing correctly.

   - Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve integration errors or data sync failures for various client systems.

   - Maintain clear technical documentation for each client’s unique integration workflows and data mappings.

*Workflow Automation for Clients

   - Help build and test automated workflows to reduce manual data entry for our clients' business teams.

   - Assist in setting up automated alerts, notifications, and scheduled tasks within client environments.

   - Update and optimize existing client automations as their business requirements evolve.

*Data Integrity & CRM Support

   - Assist with data cleanup, mapping, and bulk imports into client CRMs and other business tools.

   - Help configure client system settings (custom fields, user permissions, etc.) to support new integrations.

   - Verify that client data remains consistent across their various platforms (e.g., ERP to CRM sync).

*Requirements Gathering & Consulting

   - Partner with client stakeholders to understand their business processes and document their technical requirements.

   - Participate in the testing and QA phase of new system rollouts for clients.

   - Actively train on our core tech stack (Boomi, Salesforce, Power BI/Automate) to take on more complex client builds.

 

Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Aptitude: A strong interest in system logic and a desire to build a career in technical integrations and automation.

*Basic API Knowledge: A foundational understanding of what an API is and familiarity with data formats like JSON.

*Comfort with APIs: Ability to read technical documentation to understand how different software platforms can be connected.

*Business Process Mindset: Ability to look at a client's manual task and visualize how it could be automated.

*Customer Service Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to explain technical status to non-technical client contacts.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*0–2 years of experience in an MSP, IT support, or junior technical role.

*Exposure to any CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) or automation tool (Zapier, Power Automate, etc.).

*Experience using Excel for data organization or basic troubleshooting.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2586) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

description:

Communicate professionally with clients via
, phone, and Zoom

Role Summary



We're looking for a video editor who lives and breathes internet culture. Someone who grew up watching YouTube and TikTok.



This is an hourly, 1099 contractor position starting at 20-25 hours per week, with the potential to increase as the company grows. This role requires the use of Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable).

Preferred but not required:

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Full-Stack Developer (WooCommerce & UX/UI Optimization)
description:
We’re looking for a second Full-Stack Developer with deep WooCommerce and WordPress experience who can manage both the back end and front end of our website at a high level. This role is about continuously optimizing, refining, and elevating our e-commerce store into a fast, functional site optimized for conversions.



This isn’t a job for someone who’s just familiar with WordPress or WooCommerce—we need a highly skilled developer who understands performance optimization, UX/UI strategy, and e-commerce best practices. If you have a strong background in site speed, front-end layout, user experience, and WooCommerce development and can make a website run as smoothly and efficiently as possible, we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

WooCommerce & WordPress Development (Back End & Front End)

• Manage, optimize, and continuously improve our WooCommerce store’s back end and front end.

• Develop and customize WordPress themes and WooCommerce templates to ensure functionality and performance.

• Troubleshoot and resolve plugin conflicts, database issues, and WooCommerce-specific problems.

• Implement custom functionality and integrations as needed.



Site Speed & Performance Optimization

• Ensure fast load times through caching, asset optimization, lazy loading, and script management.

• Optimize WooCommerce databases, queries, and server resources to enhance site performance.

• Minify and defer CSS, JavaScript, and HTML for maximum efficiency.

• Conduct regular audits.

• Manage CDN strategies, server optimizations, and hosting best practices to maintain peak performance.



UX/UI Design & Conversion Optimization

• Continuously refine site layout, navigation, and overall design for maximum usability and conversions.

• Conduct A/B testing, heatmap analysis, and user behavior tracking to identify friction points.

• Optimize product pages, checkout flow, and calls to action (CTAs) to improve customer experience and increase sales.

• Ensure a mobile-first design and full responsiveness across all devices.



Technical SEO & Security

• Assist the team with technical SEO best practices (schema markup, structured data, URL optimization).

• Ensure secure WordPress practices, including firewalls, malware protection, and regular updates.

• Manage 301 redirects, broken links, and site structure improvements.



What We’re Looking For:

- Extensive WooCommerce and WordPress experience (not just general WordPress development skills).

- Strong knowledge of PHP, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

- Proven experience optimizing site speed (must have real-world examples).

- Deep understanding of UX/UI principles and how they impact conversions.

- Experience with CRO techniques (A/B testing, analytics, heatmaps).

- Familiarity with performance testing tools (GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights, Lighthouse).

- Ability to troubleshoot WooCommerce issues (beyond plugin installations).

- Strong problem-solving skills—you should be able to identify and fix bottlenecks proactively.



Nice to Have (Bonus Skills):

Hands-on experience with Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and other marketing tech.



We are a U.S.-based company, and this role requires working closely with our team, which operates on Eastern Standard Time (EST). The position follows a standard work schedule of Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM EST. Candidates must be available during these hours.



Ready to Join Us?

If you feel like you would be a great addition to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Experienced E-Commerce Product SEO Specialist - Etsy/Shopify/Amazon/Ebay - Immediate Hire

We are seeking a highly skilled SEO Product Specialist to join our growing Filipino-based eCommerce team. You will be responsible for optimizing product listings across Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon to ensure our products rank high and convert effectively. We operate 5 eCommerce stores that require ongoing SEO updates and A+ content creation. You will create graphics, update listings, add new products, update pricing, and more. 



You will be working directly with our team lead/team that is based in the Philippines; however, work hours are 10 PM GMT to 3 AM GMT, and PHP time 



Responsibilities

Optimize product titles, tags, descriptions, and backend SEO across multiple platforms.

Upload and configure Shopify product listings with SEO-optimized content.

Add products, manage, and update TikTok Seller Central listings.

Create engaging A+ Content (Amazon Enhanced Brand Content) with strong visuals and persuasive copy.

title: Team Lead – E-Commerce & Creative Operations
description:
Team Lead – E-Commerce & Creative Operations (Remote – Philippines)

Company: HouseSensationsArt (USA)

Pay: $3.50 USD/hour

Hours: 20–30 hours/week (with potential to grow to 30–40 hours). 

Schedule: Between 9:00 PM – 5:00 AM GMT-8 (variable within this window based on workload)

Work Location: Remote – Philippines

Start Date: ASAP (must be available to interview and start immediately)

Payment: Weekly via Wise

Time Tracking: TimeProof required

Contract: NDA + Employment Contract required

Note: We are a U.S. Government Contractor



About the Company

HouseSensationsArt is a fast-growing American manufacturing and e-commerce brand specializing in business signage, custo
tal home décor, and personalized home and commercial signage. We sell across Etsy, Shopify, Amazon, eBay, TikTok Shop, and also work locally and nationally through government contracting. As we continue to scale, we are expanding our remote leadership team in the Philippines.



Position Overview

We are hiring an experienced Team Lead to oversee and manage our multi-platform e-commerce and creative operations ( graphic design). This is a leadership role and a task role.  You will manage people, systems, workflows, and quality across teams while working closely with senior leadership and U.S.-based management. You will also assist with tasks across each platform. This is a long-term role with growth and promotion opportunities for the right candidate.



Key Responsibilities

Team Leadership & Operations: Lead and manage 5 to 8 tea
mbers. Work directly with Senior Lead, Department Leads, and U.S. Management & Design Teams. Oversee E-commerce Product Specialists, Graphic Designers, Marketing Team, Development/Support, IT, Legal, and Customer Service.

Daily Management Duties: Assign and oversee daily tasks. Conduct morning and evening team check-ins. Enforce SOPs, deadlines, and quality standards. Review and approve designs, mockups, product listings, and creative assets. Train staff on workflows, tools, and SOPs. Interview, onboard, and terminate remote employees when necessary. Maintain project boards, forms, files, and documentation.

E-Commerce Platform Management: Oversee and optimize daily operations on Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop, Etsy, and eBay. Manage product listings and variations, creative asset coordination, workflow management, quality control and approvals, SKU pricing and category organization, SEO consistency, and brand alignment. Support both B2C and B2B initiatives. Identify gaps, improve processes, and increase efficiency. Report performance, blockers, and metrics to ownership.

Graphic Design & Creative Support: Applicants must have strong design skills. Create and edit listing images, lifestyle graphics, and mockups. Edit vector files (AI, SVG, EPS). Build A+ Content. Ensure brand consistency across platforms.

Required Software Knowledge: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Canva.

SEO, Marketing & Content Support: Write and optimize titles, tags, descriptions, and alt-text. Track listing performance and recommend improvements. Assist with social media content 
, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest), seasonal promotions, and ads 
, Instagram, TikTok). Experience with A+ Content is a plus.

Shopify Web Support (Basic–Intermediate): Edit themes and correct layout or formatting issues. Update pages, collections, and navigation. Work with apps such as Customily, Zepto, and other Shopify integrations.



Required Skills & Experience

Proven experience leading remote teams. Strong working knowledge of Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop, Etsy, and eBay. Strong understanding of SEO, branding, product niches, and target audiences. Experience with B2B and B2C sales strategies. Project management experience including task assignment, deadlines, and accountability. Proficient with Google Sheets and project management tools such as ClickUp, Nifty, Asana, or Trello. Fluent in written and spoken English. Excellent leadership, organization, and communication skills.



What We’re Looking For

Dependable and honest — attendance and punctuality are critical. Able to consistently work scheduled hours. Looking for long-term growth, not short-term work. Proactive leader who takes ownership. Strong problem-solver who corrects mistakes professionally. Detail-oriented with high-quality standards. Comfortable in a fast-growing, multi-brand environment. Dependability is non-negotiable; we need someone who shows up every day.



How to Apply

Please
 the following to 

: Resume, Portfolio and work samples (designs, listings, mockups, etc.), Short introduction video, Brief explanation of why you are the best candidate for this role, Screenshot of your internet speed test, Acknowledgement of work hours, salary, TimeProof, NDA, and Contract, Availability to interview, and Start date availability.



We look forward to speaking with you!

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
TITLE: Patient Care Coordinator



DESCRIPTION:

The primary objective of the patient care coordinator is to ensure that patients are properly attended to and assisted throughout their journey through the system by calling leads and scheduling appointments with providers.

The patient care coordinator must assist the patient in any informational or administrative issues that they may come in contact with.



The patient care coordinator owns all aspects of the patient journey. They are responsible for answering questions, interpreting responses, and evaluating improvements based on their experience with their patient’s needs.

The patient care coordinator must primarily support the patient’s journey while at the same time taking part in process improvement initiatives. They must be able to act autonomously, with minimal supervision, executing tasks based on company directives and goals under fast-paced timelines.



QUALIFICATIONS:

Excellent verbal and written English communication skills [C2(Advanced/Mastery) preferred]

Be extremely organized, positive, and uplifting. The patient care coordinator is the second face of the company (after the website / sign-up app)!

Proper patient intake / after appointment coordination

Proper execution of emerging patient roadblocks and challenges

Proactive management of the patient journey

Knowledge of EMR and privacy requirements in the Canada/USA (HIPAA, PHIPA, PIPEDA)

Business and tech-savvy acumen

Engagement with the product development team for process improvement initiatives

Maintain a professional and respectful relationship with all patients & MD correspondence

Support cross-functional projects relating to but not directly supported by the patient intake team

Ability to work with confidential company information.

Be flexible with your available workday/times. Overnight work might be required due to the time difference.



EDUCATION / EXPERIENCE:

Bachelor’s Degree, Healthcare Management, Nursing, Patient Care, Public Health

Minimum of 2 years related experience

Customer care industry experience

Experience within the healthcare and/or cloud computing industries is desired

Basic mathematical and computer skills

Google & Microsoft Office Suite

Experience working with and improving standard procedures & processes

Demonstrated ability to learn new skills and interact with new systems/ procedures

Presentation experience

Strong interpersonal skills



ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS:

Assist patients in the USA / Canada.

Must be able to adequately perform the above duties with reasonable accommodation.

Must have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to work.



If interested, please include a link to your updated resume as well as link to a 3-5 minute video introduction to your message/application and send it to jobs [at] rocketdoctor [d0t] io.

 provided in this manner to avoid masking and save interested candidate effort of having to register or log in to OnlineJobs.

title: Social Media Expert
description:
We are a US-based creator brand building #GoonieLife – an adventurous, RV-based lifestyle and travel brand – and we’re looking for a part-time Social Media & Content Editor based in the Philippines.

Your mission is to turn our raw videos and photos into scroll?stopping content, grow our audience, and tell compelling stories on Instagram and YouTube.

Role details

• Position: Part-Time Social Media & Content Editor

• Location: Remote, Philippines only

• Hours: ~20 hours per week (flexible, some overlap with US daytime preferred)

• Pay: $400 USD per month, paid monthly via Wise/PayPal

• Platforms: Instagram (Reels, Stories, posts) and YouTube (long-form and Shorts)

What you’ll do

• Edit short-form and long-form videos from our raw footage for IG Reels, IG posts, Stories, and YouTube/Shorts.

• Create thumbnails and graphics using our brand style (Canva, Photoshop, or similar).

• Curate and edit photos for posts, carousels, and stories.

• Write engaging captions, titles, and hooks that match the #GoonieLife vibe and encourage comments, shares, and saves.[recooty]

• Plan a simple weekly content calendar for IG and YT based on our goals and footage.

• Post/schedule content at optimal times and track basic metrics (views, saves, subscribers, follower growth).

• Suggest new content ideas, trends, and audio that fit our brand.

• Help maintain a consistent brand voice and look across all content.

What we’re looking for

• Based in the Philippines with strong written English and internet connection.

• 1–3+ years of experience in social media management and/or video editing for IG, YT, TikTok, or similar. Entry to mid-level PH social media managers typically earn within this range, so this rate is competitive for a part-time role.[indeed +1]

• Proven portfolio: IG accounts, YouTube channels, or sample videos you’ve edited.

• Strong skills with video editing tools (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, VN, etc.).

• Comfortable using Canva or similar design tools for thumbnails and graphics.

• Understands Reels/Shorts trends, hooks, and storytelling for lifestyle/travel content.

• Organized, reliable, and able to hit deadlines with minimal supervision.

• Bonus: Experience with travel, van life, RV, outdoors, or lifestyle brands.

What you’ll get

• Stable monthly retainer: $400/month for ~20 hours/week.

• Long-term opportunity if performance is strong and the brand grows. Freelancer social media managers in the Philippines often earn in the $500–$1,500+ range full-time, so there is room to increase scope and pay over time.[levelup]

• Flexible schedule (as long as deadlines are met).

• Creative freedom to help shape the #GoonieLife look, feel, and community.

How to apply

Please send an
 with the subject line:  

“Social Media & Content – [Your Name] – Philippines”

Include:

• A short introduction (2–3 sentences) about who you are and why you’re a fit for #GoonieLife.

• Links to 2–5 social media accounts or videos you’ve managed/edited (IG, YT, TikTok, etc.).

• A quick breakdown of your editing tools (video and graphics).

• Your city in the Philippines and typical working hours.

Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.[recooty]

description:
SEO Specialist | Full-Time



$2,000 USD/month + Bonuses | 13th Month Pay



Remodel Titans is a US-based agency that helps kitchen and bathroom remodeling contractors dominate local search. We're niche-focused, systems-driven, and growing fast.



The Role

We have the SOPs, the systems, and the team — developers, content writers, and VAs all in place. We need an experienced SEO professional to run the show. You'll manage client accounts, coordinate the team, ensure quality across every deliverable, and use your SEO expertise to keep everything performing at a high level.

You're not building from scratch. You're stepping into a well-oiled machine with strategy guidance from leadership. But we need someone who understands SEO well enough to know why we do what we do — and sharp enough to catch gaps before they become problems.



What You'll Be Doing

- Managing multiple client accounts from onboarding through ongoing delivery

- Coordinating developers, content writers, and VAs in ClickUp

- Overseeing GBP management, citations, and local SEO execution via LeadSnap

- QA on content, on-page SEO, and technical implementations

- Running monthly reporting, audits, and client check-ins

- Keeping projects on track and making sure nothing slips



What We're Looking For

- 2+ years of SEO experience — local SEO knowledge is a strong plus

- Experience coordinating or managing a team

- Comfortable working within SOPs and structured systems

- Strong attention to detail and high-quality standards

- Excellent written English

- Available to work US Eastern Standard Time hours

What You'll Get

- $2,000 USD/month base salary

- 13th month pay

- Performance bonuses for client retention and on-time deliverables

- 10 paid time off days per year

- All US holidays off (paid)

- Full SOPs and training for every process — no guesswork

How to Apply

title: Zoho Sales Administrator
description:
Part Time to Start - May move to full time



Part-Time Zoho CRM Sales Administrator

Company: Excess IT Hardware / ShredTheDrive



About Us

We are a fast-growing IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) and Data Destruction company serving healthcare, education, property management, and enterprise clients nationwide. We specialize in secure electronics recycling, NIST 800-88 data destruction, and IT decommissioning services. Our sales process is driven through Zoho CRM and integrated outbound tools.



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Zoho CRM Sales Administrator to manage, optimize, and maintain our Zoho CRM environment. This role supports sales operations, pipeline accuracy, reporting, and CRM automation. The ideal candidate understands how CRM structure directly impacts revenue growth.



This is a systems, process, and reporting role that supports revenue generation - This is not a cold-calling role. 



Responsibilities



Zoho CRM Management

• Maintain pipeline accuracy across all deal stages

• Clean and standardize contact and company records

• Build and maintain workflows, automation rules, and task triggers

• Create and manage custom fields, layouts, and modules

• Ensure proper tagging and segmentation for campaigns



Sales Reporting & Dashboards

• Build dashboards for KPIs (new business, win-backs, close rates, revenue by vertical)

• Generate weekly pipeline and forecast reports

• Track sales rep performance metrics

• Monitor lead sources and campaign effectiveness



Automation & Integrations

• Manage integrations with tools such as Apollo,
 marketing platforms, and outbound tools

• Improve workflow efficiency through automation

• Identify process gaps and recommend CRM improvements



Data Hygiene & Organization

• Eliminate duplicates

• Ensure correct territory assignments

• Maintain consistent formatting and data standards

title: Video editor and post production processor
description:
Core Responsibilities



1. Video Editing & Post Production



Each episode will require:

Audio cleanup and processing (EQ, compression, noise reduction)

Clear, balanced dialogue

Removal of distractions (dead space, obvious flubs when directed)

Add intro sequence

Add sponsor segment

Add outro if provided

Color correction and grading (natural, consistent skin tones)

Remove unusable clips (especially out-of-focus shots)

If a speaker is out of focus ? use the wide/broad camera angle instead

Clean transitions between camera angles



Export optimized video for:

YouTube

Social clips (if requested)

Professional polish is required. No amateur audio. No inconsistent color. No distracting edits.



2. Audio Podcast Version



For each episode:

Export audio-only version

Proper loudness normalization for podcast platforms

Add intro/sponsor tags as required

Prepare MP3 or WAV in correct distribution format

Upload to podcast hosting platform (details provided).



3. Episode Webpage Creation



For each episode, create and publish a webpage including:

Embedded video

Embedded audio

Episode title

Episode description (light formatting)

Guest bio (if provided)

Sponsor section

SEO-friendly formatting

Proper tagging and categories

Attention to layout consistency is critical.



Required Skills

Advanced knowledge of video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

Strong audio processing capability (clear vocal dialogue is non-negotiable)

Basic color grading competency

Experience switching multi-camera footage

Familiarity with podcast publishing workflows

Website publishing experience (WordPress preferred)

Ability to follow structure and maintain consistency

Ideal Candidate

Detail-driven

Fast but precise

Understands pacing of interview content

Strong sense of visual cleanliness

Comfortable working independently

Interested in long-term recurring work

Compensation

Paid per episode (rate determined after selection)

Ongoing, recurring project

Growth potential as podcast expands

Paid Tryout Option – $30

We are selecting 5 applicants for a paid editing trial.

Each selected applicant will receive:

One short podcast segment (raw footage)

Intro + sponsor assets

Basic publishing instructions

Tryout Requirements

You must:

Adjust color to clean, natural tone

Process audio to professional clarity

Add intro and sponsor

Remove any out-of-focus clips of the speaker

If the primary camera is out of focus, use the wide camera angle



Deliver:

Final video file

Audio-only version

Draft webpage layout (text mockup is acceptable)

Payment: $30 upon completion

We are evaluating:

Audio clarity

Editing decisions

Attention to detail

Color consistency

Professional finish

The best editor(s) will be offered recurring work.



How To Apply

If interested:

Send a message through the onlinejobs.ph messaging. 



Include:

A brief introduction

Relevant editing experience

Portfolio or sample work

Confirmation you are willing to complete the $30 paid tryout

A short note explaining why you want this role

Applicants who demonstrate initiative and enthusiasm will stand out.
