title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+ Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb 2026".



In your
 body, you MUST include the following, and ONLY the following please:

- An attachment of your resume in PDF format

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



- No other information/cover letter or attachments should be included, besides a simple salutation and signature if so desired.



NOTE- Please do NOT apply using other methods besides the above. Any applicants who reach out to us via phone, social media, or any method other than the instructions above will automatically be disqualified.

Only those who followed the above instructions will be contacted within up to 2 business days, with further instructions.





We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Airbnb Co-host Position (Remote)
description:
Schedule: 2 possible shifts to choose from - 

1. 6am-3pm (Pacific Time)

2. 3pm to 12am (Pacific Time)

6 days a week. + Overtime pay if taking additional shifts or days.



Location: Remote, must reliably work on Pacific Time 

Experience Level: Experienced (Airbnb co-hosting / short-term rental operations required)



About the Role

We’re looking for an experienced Airbnb Co-Host to manage day-to-day guest communication and operational coordination for our Airbnb listings based in Las Vegas, NV. This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, calm under pressure, and is committed to delivering excellent guest experiences, while also keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes.



You’ll be responsible for guest messaging, calendar management, stay optimization, and coordinating cleaning and maintenance to ensure our properties stay guest-ready and consistently earn strong reviews.



Key Responsibilities

- Guest Communication & Customer Service

- Respond to guest inquiries and messages promptly and professionally in clear, fluent English

- Provide detailed pre-arrival instructions, check-in guidance, house rule reminders, and local recommendations

- Handle guest issues and complaints with empathy and efficiency, aiming to resolve concerns quickly

- Manage cancellations, refunds, alterations, and disputes (when needed) using Airbnb best practices



Calendar Management & Stay Optimization

- Maintain and manage the Airbnb Calendar with accuracy across all listings

- Optimize stays and vacancies by monitoring occupancy gaps and adjusting availability strategically, coordinating turnarounds to enable back-to-back bookings when possible, applying minimum stays, gap-night strategies, and booking rules to reduce vacancy

- Ensure reservation details, check-in/check-out timing, and special requests are tracked and communicated



Cleaning & Turnover Coordination

- Schedule and coordinate cleaning staff for turnovers and deep cleans

- Ensure cleaners have: accurate arrival/departure timing, access instructions and job expectations, a clear checklist and photo verification

- Confirm completion and readiness prior to guest arrival



Maintenance Coordination & Issue Resolution

- Coordinate maintenance staff/vendors for repairs, preventative maintenance, and emergency issues

- Triage incoming issues (HVAC, plumbing, locks, internet, appliances, etc.) and dispatch the right resource fast

- Track maintenance requests to completion and confirm quality of work

- Communicate updates to guests as needed while protecting the guest experience

- Dispute false negative reviews with the Airbnb Resolution Center



Operational Excellence & Reporting

- Maintain records of i
, repairs, vendor notes, and recurring issues

- Identify recurring problems and recommend process improvements

- Support listing performance by flagging opportunities (guest feedback trends, amenity upgrades, operational gaps)



Required Qualifications

- Proven experience as an Airbnb Co-Host, short-term rental VA, or property management operator

- Strong working knowledge of: Airbnb Inbox, Airbnb Calendar, Reservation modifications and day-to-day hosting tools

- Excellent written and spoken English (must be able to communicate professionally with guests)

- Demonstrated customer service excellence (conflict resolution, empathy, professionalism)

- Proven ability to coordinate cleaning and maintenance teams and manage time-sensitive turnovers

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks without dropping the ball

- Reliable high-speed internet and consistent availability during your selected shift



Preferred (Nice-to-Have) Skills

- Experience managing multiple listings/properties at once

- Experience with SOPs, checklists, quality control photos, and vendor performance tracking

- Familiarity with PMS tools (e.g., Hostaway, Guesty, Hospitable) if applicable

- Hospitality mindset and a proactive “problem-solver” attitude



What Success Looks Like

- Guests receive prompt, professional responses and feel well-supported

- Calendars are accurate, turnarounds are smooth, and vacancy gaps are minimized

- Cleanings and maintenance are well-coordinated with minimal last-minute issues

- Strong guest reviews and reduced operational fires through proactive management

- Any damage caused by guest is reimbursed by AirCover in a timely manner



How to Apply 

Please include:

- A brief summary of your Airbnb co-hosting / STR experience

- Number of listings you’ve supported and what you were responsible for

- Your shift preference, confirming your readiness and availability for your selected shift (Pacific Time)

- Answer to the following question:

  > What is a challenging scenario you have experienced during your previous hosting experience and how did you handle it?



On AI-generated Applications: 

While we support leveraging AI to proofread your responses for professionalism and tone, we will not be considering applications that are entirely composed by AI, without any user input or review, as these applications do not allow us to meaningfully gauge the applicant's critical thinking, accuracy, and professionalism.

title: DIGITAL BUSINESS MANAGER - MOMENTUM ACADEMY
description:
I run Momentum Academy (business coaching for service business owners) and Success by Numbers (finance director services). I need someone who can own the digital operations side of my business - from social media execution to problem-solving tech issues to setting up new passive income opportunities.



I create the content and strategy - you own the operations, distribution, and implementation. Think of this as running the engine room while I steer the ship.



This isn't a "wait for instructions" VA role. You'll manage all digital marketing operations, content distribution, and tech implementation while I focus on strategy, content creation, and client delivery.



The #1 skill for this role is independent problem-solving. When you encounter a platform you've never used, a task you've never done, or a problem you don't immediately know how to solve - your first instinct must be to research, test, and figure it out yourself, not to ask me for step-by-step instructions.



If you need detailed SOPs and procedures to do your work, this isn't the right role for you.



If you Google things, watch YouTube tutorials, test different approaches, and come back with "here's what I learned and here's what I recommend" - this role is perfect for you.



What You'll Own



Social Media & Podcast Distribution (30%)



Manage content across Instagram,
, YouTube, Snapchat (I create videos, you handle everything else)

Edit and post podcast episodes with show notes, clips, promotional content

Schedule and distribute all content using existing systems

Track performance and recommend improvements



Revenue & Partnership Development (30%)



Research affiliate programs for us to promote (tools/services our audience needs)

Find potential affiliates who could promote our Money Mindset Journal and Academy programs

Set up new sales channels like TikTok Shop

Build landing pages, tracking links,
 sequences for affiliate and partnership campaigns once approved

Present options with recommendations, then I handle the outreach and pitching



Tech Problem-Solving (25%)



Figure out platforms when I get stuck (recent examples: BookVault commission setup, Instagram/Facebook linking)

Research and implement new tools as business needs evolve

Troubleshoot CRM (Go High Level), website, payment systems, integrations

Learn new platforms quickly without needing me to teach you



Business Support (15%)



Daily check-ins to align on priorities and discuss opportunities

Handle correspondence related to podcast guests, partnerships, admin

Keep systems running smoothly

Document processes as you build them





You're the Right Person If:

? Self-directed learner - When you don't know something, you research it (Google, YouTube, help docs, forums) and figure it out rather than waiting for instructions

? Problem-solver first - When something doesn't work, you troubleshoot and try different approaches before escalating to me

? Social media savvy - You understand Instagram,
, YouTube, Snapchat, TikTok and can manage content distribution effectively

? Tech confident - Comfortable with tools like Go High Level, Canva, CapCut, podcast platforms, affiliate networks (or can learn them fast)

? Digital marketing knowledge - Understand funnels, affiliates, landing pages, content strategy

? Takes initiative - You can take "I need this to happen" and make it happen without step-by-step guidance

? Proactive communicator - Daily voice notes/updates feel natural to you



You're NOT Right If:

? You only work well with detailed SOPs and procedures

? You need constant supervision or get stuck without instructions

? You're uncomfortable learning new platforms independently

? You prefer working in isolation rather than daily collaboration

? Your first response to problems is "this doesn't work" rather than "let me try to solve this"

title: Social Media Content Editor & Scheduler
description:

title: Sales Closer – Tariff Refund Recovery Specialist | Remote | Base + Commission
description:
Sales Closer – Tariff Refund Recovery Specialist | Remote | Base + Commission

Did you know that thousands of U.S. businesses have been overcharged on customs duties and tariffs — and most of them have no idea? We find that money and help them get it back. Tariff Duty Forensics is a fast-growing trade compliance consulting firm and we are expanding our sales team immediately.

This is a ground floor opportunity with a company in the right place at the right time. Tariff issues are front page news and business owners are scared and confused. You come in as the expert who has answers and a solution. This practically sells itself to the right person.

What you'll be doing:

You will be speaking directly with business owners, CFOs, purchasing managers, and importers who bring goods into the United States. These are warm and inbound leads — people who are already aware they may have a problem. Your job is to walk them through our forensic audit process, answer their questions confidently, and close them into one of our service programs. You will also follow up with prospects and manage your pipeline.

This is a consultative sale. You are not pushing a product — you are offering a financial recovery service that puts real money back in their pocket. Business owners respond well to that message when delivered by someone who sounds sharp, professional, and trustworthy.

Who we are looking for:



Native or near-native English speaker with a clear, professional phone presence

Minimum 3 years of B2B phone sales, closing, or consultative sales experience

Comfortable and confident speaking with executives and business owners

Background in financial services, legal services, consulting, or logistics is a strong advantage

Self-managed, dependable, and motivated by performance pay

Must be available during U.S. business hours Monday through Friday



Compensation:



Base pay: $850/month

Commission: 20% of every closed sale

Strong closers realistically earn $4,000–$8,000/month

No earnings cap — your income grows with your performance

Training begins March 9th — start date is firm; apply now



This is a remote position. You will work from home using provided scripts, CRM tools, and sales materials. Full training is provided starting March 9th so you hit the ground running.

How to apply:

To be considered, you must send two things. First, a current resume. Second, a 60-second voice recording introducing yourself and describing your sales background. In your voice recording, please include the word "forensics" somewhere so we know you actually read this entire posting. Applications submitted without both a resume and voice note will not be reviewed.

We are looking to fill this role quickly. If you are serious about earning real money in a hot market, apply today.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Records Review & Data Quality Assistant
description:
Full-time preferred. Can be Part-time for the right candidate

Must overlap at least 2–4 hours with U.S. MT



About the Role:



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Data Operations Specialist to help maintain the accuracy and integrity of our database. This role goes beyond basic data entry. You’ll be responsible for reviewing records, identifying inconsistencies, correcting errors, and ensuring information across systems is accurate, complete, and up to date.



If you enjoy working with structured data, following clear processes, and catching issues before they become problems, this role is a great fit.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

-Review existing database records for accuracy, completeness, and consistency

-Enter, update, and correct data across internal systems

-Cross-check information against source records and defined rules

-Identify missing, outdated, or conflicting data and resolve or escalate as needed

-Follow Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and validation guidelines

-Flag patterns or recurring issues that may indicate system or process improvements

-Maintain clear documentation when changes or corrections are made



What This Role Is Not:

-Not creative writing or content creation

-Not customer support or live chat

-Not software engineering or database architecture

-Not “just typing” without thinking



This role requires judgment, attention to detail, and accountability for accuracy.



Required Skills & Experience

-2+ years of experience in data entry, data operations, QA, or back-office support

-Strong attention to detail and ability to spot inconsistencies

-Comfortable working with spreadsheets, dashboards, or web-based tools

-Ability to follow detailed instructions and SOPs precisely

-Clear written English and ability to leave accurate internal notes

-Reliable internet connection and consistent availability



How Success Is Measured:

-Accuracy of data updates and corrections

-Ability to catch errors before they cause downstream issues

-Consistency in following SOPs

-Clear documentation and communication when issues arise

-Low rework or correction rates



APPLY HERE:

title: AirBnb | STR Co-Host & Manager
description:
Marketing & Distribution



Listing Creation: Professional photography, 3D tours, and keyword-optimized descriptions for platforms like Airbnb, Vrbo, and 
.

Channel Management: Syncing calendars across all platforms to prevent double-bookings.

Direct Booking Website: Developing and managing a standalone site to avoid OTA (Online Travel Agency) fees.

Dynamic Pricing: Using AI-driven tools to adjust rates daily based on local events, seasonality, and competitor occupancy.



Guest Experience & Communication

Inquiry Management: Responding to potential guests within minutes (often using AI-assisted tools for speed).

Vetting & Screening: Verifying guest identities and checking for history of "party house" behavior.

Digital Guidebooks: Providing guests with QR-coded manuals for WiFi, appliance instructions, and local recommendations.

Check-in/Out Logistics: Managing smart lock codes or physical key exchanges.

Review Management: Proactively asking for reviews and professionally responding to feedback.



Managing On-the-Ground Operations

Cleaning Coordination: Scheduling professional cleaners immediately after every checkout.

Linen Service: Laundering or replacing high-quality towels and bedding.

Restocking Essentials: Monitoring and replenishing "consumables" (toilet paper, coffee, shampoo, cleaning supplies).

Quality Inspections: Conducting a walkthrough after the cleaning team leaves to ensure the "stage" is perfect for the next guest.



Maintenance & Property Care

Preventative Maintenance: Regular HVAC filter changes, battery replacements for smoke detectors/remotes, and pest control.

On-Call Repairs: Having a 24/7 "hotline" for guest emergencies (e.g., a burst pipe or a lockout).

Landscape: Managing recurring exterior services to maintain curb appeal.

Inventory Audits: Periodically checking for missing kitchenware or damaged furniture.





Financial Reporting

Monthly Statements: Providing owners with a clear breakdown of gross revenue, management fees, cleaning costs, and net payouts.

Expense Tracking: Archiving receipts for repairs and utilities for year-end tax preparation.

title: MSP | IT Engineer / Project Technician / Level 2 Help Desk Support / RMM Automation and Scripting (Client Facing Daytime
description:
Step into a senior-level MSP support role where your technical depth, scripting ability, and communication skills actually shape the stability of client environments, working alongside an established Filipino team.



You’ll operate during Philippines daytime hours, overlapping U.S. CST afternoons and evenings (2pm–11pm CST with an hour break), serving as a high-level escalation technician while building the automation backbone that keeps everything running predictably. This role blends Level 2 help desk execution with backend infrastructure work, RMM automation, and after-hours stability coverage.



This is not an entry-level ticket grinder role. You’ll handle advanced troubleshooting, server-side work, and complex escalations during peak U.S. hours — then shift into focused backend improvements and projects once end users log off. That includes scripting, rebuilding and standardizing ConnectWise Automate, restoring structure lost during past migrations, and expanding our Immybot deployment strategy.



You’ll also provide calm, professional after-hours phone, chat, and
 support for a small subset of top-level clients, where clarity and fluent English communication matter just as much as technical precision.



ReachOut Digital Intelligence is a cybersecurity-first Managed Service Provider built like a SaaS company. We license protection, deliver MSP IT support as fulfillment, and give clients structure and security before anything breaks.





***ABOUT THE ROLE

This role is the “glue” between clients, operation standards, and the rest of the internal technical team.



You’ll operate during Philippines daytime hours, overlapping U.S. CST afternoons, handling tickets alongside the help desk team. During peak U.S. hours, you’ll focus on escalations, troubleshooting. After U.S. business hours, you’ll shift into backend work – project execution, server maintenance, automation builds, documentation cleanup, and RMM standardization.



You’ll also serve as after-hours phone, chat, and
 support for select clients. Ticket volume is typically low — but when issues arise, you’ll be the calm, capable voice on the other end.



A major part of this role is rebuilding and standardizing our ConnectWise Automate and Immybot environments after prior migration loss. That means writing PowerShell scripts, deploying automation policies, cleaning up monitors, improving patching workflows, and reducing manual work across the board.



If you enjoy a role that blends technical expertise, communication, and strategic influence, you will thrive here.





***WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Core Requirements:

- 4–6+ years in an MSP help desk or infrastructure role (L2 or higher)

- Strong experience handling escalations independently

- Experience executing client-facing IT projects (servers, M365, networks, deployments)

- Comfort working Philippines daytime hours aligned to U.S. CST

- Ability to work independently during after-hours U.S. support windows



Technical Strength:

- Microsoft 365 Administration (Azure AD, Intune, Exchange)

- Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy

- Strong PowerShell scripting ability (not beginner-level)

- Virtualization with Hyper-V

- Networking fundamentals: VLANs, routing, switching, VPN, DNS/DHCP

- Firewalls: SonicWall, Fortinet, or Ubiquiti (etc.)

- Backup & DR: Acronis, Datto, VEEAM

- EDR/MDR platforms (SentinelOne, Crowdstrike, Webroot, Huntress, or similar)

- PSA/RMM tools (ConnectWise, Autotask, Kaseya, NinjaOne, Automate)



Mindset & Professional Qualities:

- Structured, organized, documentation-focused

- Calm under pressure during live client issues

- Proactive, self-managing, and always thinking ahead

- Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to draft communication and documentation

- Takes ownership without waiting to be told

- Thrives in a role where both tech and people skills matter



***SKILLS & TOOLS YOU’LL USE REGULARLY

- Ticket System (ConnectWise / Autotask / Kaseya / Automate)

- IT Glue / Hudu

- ImmyBot, Automate/Ninja, Liongard

- Microsoft 365 Admin Center

- Windows Server

- UniFi Cloud Management

- Backup management

- Networking

- ChatGPT

- Google Workspace / Slack / Zoom



***WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Escalated tickets are resolved cleanly, with clear documentation and no repeat issues

- After-hours support feels calm, professional, and controlled

- Server builds and workstation deployments follow consistent, repeatable standards

- ConnectWise Automate becomes cleaner, more structured, and more automated every month

- Immybot deployments reduce manual workstation setup time

- Your PowerShell scripts eliminate recurring tickets

- Documentation improves because of your updates — not despite them

- Other technicians resolve more tickets confidently using what you built

- Reactive noise decreases because automation replaces repetition

- Clients experience stability, not chaos



You don’t just fix the issue.

You reduce the chance it happens again.

title: MSP | Network Administrator / IT Senior Engineer / Client Account Manager (Client Facing)
description:
Step into a senior MSP role where your technical skills AND communication strengths truly matter.

You'll be working alongside an existing Filipino team.

You’ll support 20–25 U.S. clients, meet directly with their contacts, supporting L1/L2 technicians, and blend Systems Engineering + Technical Account Management.



This is not a help desk role. You’ll spend your time leading client conversations, reviewing environments, preventing issues before they happen, and helping clients understand the “why” behind cybersecurity and IT infrastructure decisions. You’ll bridge technical precision with professional communication, bringing structure, stability, and confidence to every interaction.



You’ll guide clients through their monthly and quarterly technology reviews, surface risks, recommend improvements, and ensure their systems stay predictable and protected. You’ll also use standardized processes, documentation, and Day-Before-Actions (DBAs) to keep reactive noise low and escalations under 10%.



ReachOut Digital Intelligence is a cybersecurity-first Managed Service Provider built like a SaaS company. We license protection, deliver support as fulfillment, and give clients structure and security before anything breaks.





***ABOUT THE ROLE

This role is the “glue” between clients, cybersecurity standards, and the rest of the internal technical team.

You’ll manage a portfolio of assigned clients, meet with their leaders, assess their environments, standardize their systems, and guide them toward secure, predictable technology, all while strengthening the relationship.



You’ll also function as a light vCIO and light vCISO, helping clients understand risk, plan ahead, and sell/recommend missing products and services of ReachOut’s IT stack.

If you enjoy a role that blends technical expertise, communication, and strategic influence, you will thrive here.





***WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

- MSP experience in roles such as Systems Engineer, Network Admin, L2/L3 helpdesk, or similar

Technical Skills:

- Microsoft 365, Azure AD, Intune

- Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy

- Firewalls: SonicWall, Fortinet, or Ubiquiti (etc.)

- Backup & DR: Acronis, Datto, VEEAM

- EDR/MDR platforms (SentinelOne, Crowdstrike, Webroot, Huntress, or similar)

- PSA/RMM tools (ConnectWise, Autotask, Kaseya, NinjaOne, Automate)



Mindset & Professional Qualities:

- Structured, organized, documentation-focused

- Confident leading conversations with executives

- Proactive, self-managing, and always thinking ahead

- Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to draft communication and documentation

- Balances empathy with technical clarity

- Thrives in a role where both tech and people skills matter



***SKILLS & TOOLS YOU’LL USE REGULARLY

- Ticket System (ConnectWise / Autotask / Kaseya / Automate)

- IT Glue / Hudu

- ImmyBot, Automate/Ninja, Liongard

- Microsoft 365 Admin Center

- Windows Server

- UniFi Cloud Management

- Backup management

- Networking

- ChatGPT

- Google Workspace / Slack / Zoom



***WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Clients trust you because you give clear, structured explanations and dependable follow-through

- Escalations stay below 10%

- Reactive tickets drop because your DBAs and standardization work are effective

- Every client has accurate, complete, audit-ready documentation

- Client Meetings feel calm, professional, and useful for the client

- Clients adopt more ReachOut protections because they understand the why

- Internal helpdesk teams become more effective due to your clarity and leadership

title: Social Media Storyteller & Strategist for Founder-led Tech Brand
description:
Hi! I'm Debbie, CEO of 
 - an AI-powered platform helping coaches replace 6+ tools with one system so they can stop drowning in admin and actually coach.



I'm looking for someone who can help me build a founder-led brand that people actually care about.



Think: Ali Abdaal, Lara Acosta, Meagan Nunez, Jun Yuh.

Founders who show up as humans, not logos. Founders with content that feels like advice from a smart friend who gets it.



If you've helped tech founders, coaches, or creators build that kind of presence and can prove it drove real outcomes (signups, waitlist adds, DMs, engagement), I can't wait to meet you!





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Content Strategy & Execution

- Own the content calendar for Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn

- Turn my voice notes, ideas, and frameworks into scripts and captions that sound like me

- Write hooks that stop the scroll AND make people think "this is for me"

- Ensure consistent, high-quality content ships every week

- Bring fresh ideas proactively; don't wait to be asked



Founder-Led Storytelling

- Help me show up as a real human building a real company

- Balance vulnerability with credibility (no toxic positivity, no guru vibes)

- Tell stories that connect emotionally but drive action

- Position Pineway as THE platform for coaches who refuse to burn out



Conversion-Focused Content

- Every post has a job: drive profile visits, waitlist signups, or customer conversations

- Track what's working and double down

- Work with our content intern on engagement and community building





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Month 1: Content calendar running, 4-5 posts/week going live, clear brand voice established



Month 3: Content directly driving waitlist signups, DMs asking about product, coaches saying "I feel seen"



Month 6: Pineway known as a founder-led brand in the coaching tools space, content machine running smoothly





YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF



- You've managed social for tech founders, SaaS companies, or creator brands

- You can write in someone else's voice naturally (not just templates)

- You understand founder-led content (it's different from agency/corporate social)

- You have examples of content that drove real outcomes (signups, engagement, revenue)

- You can show me work where the founder's personality came through

- You're self-directed: you bring ideas, you don't wait for briefs

- Your English is excellent (warm, direct, compelling, plus no fluff)





YOU'RE NOT A FIT IF



- Your portfolio is full of aesthetic grids, but no proof of impact

- You've only worked with restaurants, fashion, or lifestyle brands

- You think "founder-led content" means posting selfies with inspirational quotes

- You need detailed briefs for every single post

- You can't show me what your work actually made someone do





WHAT YOU'LL GET



- $1,500-2,000 USD/month (based on experience + portfolio strength)

- Raises tied to growth milestones (waitlist signups, revenue)

- Fully remote

- Work directly with me (CEO) & a small team. No layers, just fast decisions

- Early equity when you transition to full-time

- Front-row seat building a brand from zero to something real





HOW TO APPLY



If you've read this far, here's what I would love to see:



1. Record a 3-minute Loom video covering:

   - Who you are and what you've worked on

   - One specific example where your content helped a founder/brand grow (show me the work + the results)

   - What excites you about working with an early-stage tech founder

   - How you'd approach building Pineway's founder-led brand



2. Write 3 hooks for this Reel topic:

   "Why coaches are losing clients because of their tools"

   (Visit 
 first to understand what we do)



3. Share 2-3 examples of founder-led content you've created

   (Screenshots, links, anything that shows your work)





If you're the right person, I can't wait to meet you! 



Talk soon!!



Debbie

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a long-term, full-time **Graphic Designer** who is passionate about visual storytelling, understands marketing performance, and can translate strategy into high-converting creative assets. This role requires someone who blends creativity with structure — designing visuals that not only look great but also drive results.



This is not just about making things “pretty.” We’re looking for a designer who understands branding, marketing psychology, and conversion-focused design.



Key Responsibilities

Creative Asset Design

Design high-quality visual assets for:

* Paid ads 
, Instagram, Google, YouTube)

* Social media content (posts, carousels, stories, thumbnails)

* Landing pages & sales pages

*
 graphics

* Funnels & opt-in pages

* Lead magnets & PDFs

* Website visuals

* Presentation decks

* Video thumbnails

* Motion graphics using AI



Branding & Visual Identity

* Maintain and evolve brand identity across all platforms.

* Develop brand guidelines (colors, typography, layout systems, imagery style).

* Ensure visual consistency across campaigns and customer touchpoints.



Performance-Driven Design

* Design creatives optimized for conversion and engagement.

* Collaborate with copywriters and media buyers to improve ad performance.

* Participate in A/B testing of visual variations.

* Analyze creative performance data and iterate designs accordingly.



Marketing & Funnel Collaboration

* Work closely with copywriters, project managers, and media buyers.

* Design landing page mockups that prioritize UX and conversion flow.

* Ensure visuals enhance messaging and guide the user journey.



Quality Assurance (QA)

* Ensure all assets meet platform specifications and technical requirements.

* Maintain organized file structures and proper naming conventions.

* Deliver final files in correct formats and resolutions.

* Proof visuals for alignment, spacing, typography accuracy, and brand consistency.



Required Education & Background

* Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Digital Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.

* Strong academic foundation in typography, layout, color theory, branding, and design systems.

* 2–5+ years of professional graphic design experience.

* Strong portfolio demonstrating marketing-focused design work.



Required Skills & Experience

Strong proficiency in:

* Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

* Canva (for fast-turnaround marketing assets)

* Basic understanding of motion graphics using AI 



Strong understanding of:

* Branding & visual identity systems

* Social media design trends

* Paid ad creative formats

* Conversion-focused design principles

* User experience (UX) fundamentals

* Layout hierarchy & typography best practices



Ability to:

* Manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously.

* Take creative direction and feedback constructively.

* Work efficiently in a fast-paced marketing environment.

* Translate marketing strategy into compelling visuals.



Personal Traits We’re Looking For

* Genuinely passionate about design and visual storytelling.

* Detail-oriented and highly organized.

* Strong eye for composition, balance, and aesthetics.

* Proactive and solutions-driven.

* Open to feedback and committed to continuous improvement.

* Takes pride in producing high-quality, polished work.



If you are someone who understands that great marketing requires great design — and you’re excited to contribute to a performance-driven team long-term — we’d love to hear from you.



Please submit:

* Your resume

* A link to your portfolio (required)

* A brief note explaining why you love design and how you approach marketing-focused creative

title: Confident Outbound Sales Rep – Weight Loss | Strong English Required

title: Production Reporting & Job Analysis
description:
Production Reporting & Job Analysis 

Role: Virtual Assistant (VA) – Production Reporting + Job Analysis

Time: Up to 4 hours/day (part-time)

Pay: $3-$5/hour

Type: Remote

Reports to: Operations / Production Leadership



Overview



We’re looking for a detail-oriented VA to support production with basic job analysis and daily reporting. This person will compile data from daily job site reports, organize it into a clean, useful format, and distribute it to the team consistently.

This is primarily a numbers/accounting mindset role (not engineering). The goal is to improve visibility, tracking, and decision-making through reliable daily data collection and reporting.



Key Responsibilities

• Collect and compile data from daily job site reports (multiple crews/projects)

• Maintain a standardized daily/weekly reporting format (we may already have a template)

• Organize production data into clear summaries (by job, crew, dates, etc.)

• Identify missing data and follow up internally to close gaps

• Distribute daily production summaries to leadership/stakeholders

• Support simple job analysis reporting (basic trends, totals, variances, etc.)

• Keep data clean and consistent for long-term tracking



Required Skills

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Comfortable with numbers and reconciling information across reports

• Solid Excel / Google Sheets skills (sorting, filtering, basic formulas)

• Reliable communication and ability to follow a daily process

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:
CREATIVE GENERALIST



We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. You’ll be responsible for creating everything from static ads and animated social assets to UGC edits and conversion-driven landing page graphics.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design static, motion, and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, and Google

- Edit high-performing UGC ads with strong hooks, CTAs, captions, and transitions

- Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.

title: Senior Developer & IT Documentation Specialist
description:
SENIOR DEVELOPER



We are looking for a Senior Developer who is a versatile, all-around technical expert capable of managing end-to-end development of systems, applications, and web platforms. The ideal candidate thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable supporting cross-functional teams with both front-end and back-end solutions, system integrations, automation, and technical troubleshooting.



This role requires a highly organized, detail-oriented, and technology-focused professional who can communicate effectively across teams, manage complex workflows, and adapt quickly to new tools and processes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Full-Stack Development & Systems Management: Design, develop, and maintain web applications, internal tools, and CMS platforms (especially WordPress); build front-end and back-end functionality, troubleshoot issues, and document systems for team accessibility.

- Integrations & Automation: Implement API integrations, database connections, and workflow automation using tools like Zapier; maintain and support company software and applications across multiple platforms.

- Data Analysis & Reporting: Analyze data, create dashboards and visualizations, and use reporting tools to support decision-making while ensuring system security and compliance.

- Collaboration & Team Support: Work closely with marketing, operations, and leadership teams; communicate technical solutions clearly; provide guidance, mentorship, and contribute to process improvements.

- Onboarding & Knowledge Sharing: Train tea
mbers, document workflows and technical tools, and support ad-hoc tasks to improve team efficiency and continuity.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in full-stack development or systems development, including front-end and back-end technologies.

- Proficiency in WordPress and other CMS platforms.

- Strong understanding of IT procedures, system architecture, and security practices.

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Excel, and data visualization tools.

- Experience with APIs, database integration, and automation tools (Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable).

- Excellent analytical, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to prioritize tasks.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and effectively in a remote work environment.

- Strong interpersonal skills and cross-team collaboration abilities.



Nice to have:

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or other e-commerce platforms.

- Familiarity with project management tools like 
, Asana, Slack, and Time Doctor.

- Knowledge of security protocols and IT compliance standards.

- Experience in digital marketing technology applications and online marketing workflows.

- Understanding of cloud-based systems and SaaS platforms.





-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





IT DOCUMENTATION SPECIALIST



The IT Documentation Specialist will create, update, and maintain documentation related to IT systems and processes. This will include writing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), creating flow charts, and troubleshooting IT documents to ensure accuracy and compliance. This role will serve as a primary technical resource for updates to the relevant documentation.



Responsibilities:

- Identify the need for, and create documents related to, IT systems and processes.

- Document IT processes such as business requirements, design reviews, system setup, configuration, user access, and security.

- Write SOPs to ensure processes are well documented.

- Create flow charts and other visuals to improve readability.

- Review and monitor documentation for accuracy and changes as needed.

- Respond promptly to requests for updates or new documents.

- Stay up to date on IT system processes and trends.

- QA Tasks to ensure that tasks are error-free

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for training and upskill advancements

- Always come prepared

- Assignments are properly actioned and handled per mag standards

- Act as a direct liaison between end users and IT, and help share knowledge in the org through documentation



Qualifications:

- 1+ years of experience in a similar role

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, computer science, or other relevant fields

- Exceptional communication capabilities, both written and verbal

- Ability to multitask and prioritize

- Proven ability to understand and write technical documents

- In-depth knowledge of IT systems and processes

- Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems

- Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.

- Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies



What We Offer:

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!



In summary, you will record tutorials or audits using Loom to get sales leads for our Agency. You will be setting up appointments, and doing
 management to schedule prospective clients w/ our Sales Managers.



If you are direct and to the point, you will fit in at MAG!



Key Responsibilities:

- Send a minimum of 17 videos daily or 85 videos weekly

- 2 Booked Calls Per Week

- Call 14-18 prospects to follow up daily.

- Send daily reports to your assigned direct manager/supervisor

- Keep an eye on Slack, especially Sales channels

- Complete at least 4 MAG courses



Qualifications:

- Excellent communication and engagement skills.

- Ability to multi-task and produce high-quality content online.

- Knows how to be professional yet must be fun and creative in making content ideas.

- Motivated, Driven, Tech Savvy, Sociable Go Getters (No experience required, we will train the right candidate)

- Should have a professional work area to do content (clear camera and audio)

- Ability to build relationships and collaborate effectively through videos.

- Must be tech-savvy and familiar with current trends.

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.



Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.



We're looking for:

- High Drive

- Friendly Introverts

- Strategic Communication Skills

- Ability to take charge, and follow through on a plan



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.

title: Litigation Paralegal (Lemon Law)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Litigation Paralegal with hands-on experience in Lemon Law cases to support attorneys throughout the litigation process. The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and familiar with managing case files, discovery, and court filings in consumer protection matters.



Key Responsibilities:



- Support attorneys in handling Lemon Law litigation cases from intake through resolution.

- Draft and prepare legal documents including pleadings, motions, discovery requests/responses, and settlement documents.

- Manage case files, evidence, and correspondence; ensure all documents are properly organized and maintained.

- Coordinate and track deadlines, hearings, depositions, and court dates.

- File documents with courts (e-filing) and serve parties in compliance with court rules.

- Communicate with clients, experts, opposing counsel, and court personnel as needed.

- Assist with trial preparation, including exhibit organization and witness coordination.

Conduct legal and factual research related to Lemon Law statutes and consumer protection regulations.



Qualifications:



- Proven experience as a Litigation Paralegal, with specific exposure to Lemon Law cases.

- Strong understanding of litigation procedures, court rules, and deadlines.

- Experience with e-filing systems and document management platforms.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple cases.

- Proficient in MS Office and legal software (e.g., Clio, NetDocuments, TrialWorks, or similar).



Preferred Skills:



- Familiarity with state and federal Lemon Law statutes.

- Experience working in a fast-paced law firm environment.

- Ability to work independently while collaborating closely with attorneys.

title: Accounting & Reconciliation Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
Hi! I'm looking for a detail-oriented accounting professional to help me with monthly bookkeeping and reconciliation. You will be in charge of reconciliating all transactions, keeping a crystal clean paper trail, and handle reporting. This is a recurring, part-time role — heaviest at month-end. I am not good at Accounting, and you will lead all Accounting decisions - you must be a very strong accountant. 



What you'll be doing:



Reconciling and tracing transactions across Odoo, Stripe, and bank (Mercury)

Tracing money movement end-to-end: Stripe payouts ? bank deposits ? Odoo records

Flagging discrepancies and helping resolve them

Assisting with monthly financial reports



What I'm looking for:



Strong understanding of reconciliation, accounting, and double-entry bookkeeping

Experience working with Odoo Accounting (this is a must)

Familiarity with Stripe and/or Mercury is a big plus

High attention to detail — you catch things others miss

Comfortable working independently with minimal hand-holding



Nice to have:



Experience reconciling physical goods products

CPA or accounting degree preferred but not required



This is a part-time role, roughly 10–20 hours per month (more at month-end close). Long-term engagement preferred.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
> Company Description



Sofia Health is a technology platform that powers booking, payments, scheduling, and operational infrastructure for independent health and wellness professionals. Our work is systems-driven, detail-heavy, and requires precision across data, reporting, and written materials.



We’re hiring a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support internal operations, reporting, and editorial quality control—not just admin tasks.







> This Role Is a Strong Fit If You:

- Are meticulous with data, documents, and formatting

- Instinctively catch errors, inconsistencies, and missing details

- Can read critically and edit for clarity without changing intent

- Are comfortable switching between spreadsheets, reports, and written content

- Take pride in clean, accurate, professional output





** This is not a social media, inbox-only, or calendar-focused VA role.



> Core Responsibilities:



Data & Reporting

- Organize, clean, and maintain structured data in spreadsheets and internal systems

- Build, update, and format reports (tables, summaries, exports)

- Work extensively with Microsoft Office, including:

- Excel (formulas, filters, sorting, validation)

- Access (tables, queries, data management, exports)

- Word & PowerPoint (consistent formatting and layout)

- Use Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive) for collaboration

- Verify data accuracy before internal or external use



Reading, Editing & Quality Control

- Review documents, reports,
s, and internal materials

- Correct grammar, spelling, formatting, and clarity issues

- Ensure consistency in terminology, structure, and presentation

- Identify errors, omissions, and inconsistencies before delivery

- Follow style and formatting guidelines precisely



Operational Support

- Maintain organized file structures and naming conventions

- Follow SOPs closely and flag issues proactively

- Support detail-heavy operational tasks across teams





> Required Skills & Experience

- Experience in a data-heavy administrative, operations, automations, or QA role

- Strong Excel skills (required)

- Experience with Microsoft Access or similar database tools

- Excellent written English and strong editing instincts

- High attention to detail and formatting standards

- Comfortable managing multiple tasks without sacrificing accuracy





> Nice-to-Have

- Experience supporting SaaS or platform-based companies

- Background in reporting, auditing, or editorial review

- Familiarity with structured operational data





> What Success Looks Like

- Data is clean, accurate, and reliable

- Documents are polished, consistent, and error-free

- Issues are caught early and communicated clearly

- Systems stay organized without constant oversight

title: Client Care Coordinator (US NATIVE ACCENT) ASAP
description:
We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Client Care Coordinator to join our healthcare support team. This role is ideal for someone with strong administrative skills, a solid understanding of medical procedures, and a genuine commitment to providing outstanding client service. You’ll play a key role in streamlining insurance processes and supporting patients with clarity, compassion, and care.



What You’ll Do: 

Accurately and promptly handle pre-authorization requests

Manage insurance tasks such as verification, claims processing, and follow-ups

Upload and track billing documentation across multiple platforms

Use DSL systems to maintain patient records and coordinate care

Communicate clearly and professionally with patients, providers, and insurance companies

Apply your medical knowledge to ensure accurate documentation and guide patients effectively



What We’re Looking For: 

Experience in healthcare administration, insurance coordination, or medical office support

Familiarity with DSL systems and insurance billing platforms

Strong understanding of medical terminology and patient care workflows

Excellent verbal communication skills with a neutral US ACCENT

Highly organized, reliable, and able to manage multiple priorities



Bonus Points: 

Certification in medical billing or healthcare administration

Hands-on experience with pre-authorizations and insurance claims

Warm, empathetic communication style

Comfortable working independently and collaboratively



If you’re ready to make a meaningful impact in a patient-centered environment and bring precision to every interaction, we’d love to hear from you.



Please send your resume and a short video introduction (minimum 2 minutes). Thank you!

title: Copywriter
description:
We are looking for a long-term, full-time **Copywriter** who is passionate about writing, obsessed with persuasive messaging, and deeply understands how words drive action. This role requires someone who can craft compelling copy across multiple platforms — from ads to funnels to
 sequences — while maintaining a consistent brand voice and high conversion standards.



This is not a “just write content” role. We are looking for a strategic thinker who understands marketing psychology, customer journeys, and performance-driven copy.



Key Responsibilities



Copywriting & Content Creation

Write high-converting copy for:

* Sales pages

* Landing pages & opt-in pages

*
 sequences & automations

* Paid ads 
, Instagram, Google, YouTube)

* Video sales letters (VSLs) & scripts

* Social media captions

* Funnel flows & upsells

* Website pages

Ensure all messaging aligns with brand voice, target audience, and campaign goals.



Conversion Optimization

* Write copy with clear structure, emotional triggers, and persuasive frameworks.

* Continuously improve copy performance through A/B testing.

* Analyze conversion data and optimize messaging accordingly.

* Understand buyer psychology and objections at each stage of the funnel.



Marketing Strategy Collaboration

* Collaborate with the marketing team to develop campaign messaging strategies.

* Align copy with funnel strategy, paid ads, and automation flows.

* Work closely with designers, media buyers, and project managers to ensure cohesive execution.



Research & Brand Voice Development

* Conduct deep audience research (pain points, desires, objections, language patterns).

* Study competitors and market positioning.

* Develop and refine brand messaging guidelines.

* Maintain consistency across all platforms and assets.



Quality Assurance (QA)

* Proofread and edit all copy for clarity, grammar, tone, and persuasion.

* Ensure messaging flows logically throughout funnels and automations.

* Maintain high standards for accuracy and brand integrity.



Required Education & Background

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, English, Advertising, or a related field.

* A minor or strong coursework focus in Writing, Creative Writing, or Persuasive Communication is highly preferred.

* 2–5+ years of professional copywriting experience (agency or in-house).

* Demonstrated portfolio of high-converting copy (sales pages, ads,
s, funnels).



Required Skills & Experience

Strong understanding of:

* Direct response copywriting

* Sales psychology & persuasion principles

* Customer journeys & funnel strategy

*
 marketing & automation sequences

* Paid ad copywriting

* Landing page optimization

* A/B testing methodologies

* Brand voice development

* Excellent English writing and editing skills - Fluency required



Ability to:



* Write both short-form and long-form copy effectively.

* Meet deadlines consistently.

* Take feedback well and iterate quickly.

* Manage multiple projects simultaneously.

* Think strategically, not just creatively.



Personal Traits We’re Looking For



* Genuinely enjoys being a copywriter — this isn’t “just a job.”

* Obsessed with words, messaging, and persuasion.

* Detail-oriented and highly self-motivated.

* Naturally curious about psychology, marketing trends, and human behavior.

* Proactive and solutions-driven.

* Takes pride in producing exceptional work.



If you live and breathe copy and want to be part of a long-term growth-focused team, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Medical Virtual Assistant (Surgery Nurse Background Required)
description:
NOW HIRING: Medical Virtual Assistant (Surgery Nurse Background Required)

???? Remote | Full-Time



We are looking for an experienced Surgery Nurse with a strong hospital background to join our team as a Medical Virtual Assistant (MedVA) supporting our U.S. healthcare clients.



Position Details:

 • Full-time | Long-term | Remote

 • $5–$7/hour (based on experience)

 • Paid U.S. Holidays



Requirements:

 • Registered Nurse with 5+ years of hospital experience (surgical setting preferred)

 • At least 2 years experience as a Medical Virtual Assistant

 • Experience in Orthopedics, Pain Management, or Neurology (at least one required)

 • Strong English communication skills (written & verbal)

 • High attention to detail and strong documentation skills



Key Responsibilities:

 • Prepare and organize Med-Legal Reports

 • Create detailed Case Chronologies

 • Perform administrative tasks and data entry

 • Review and summarize medical records

 • Support physicians with documentation and coordination tasks



System Experience:

 • eClinicalWorks (ECW) experience is a strong advantage



TO APPLY:  

Submit your application by sending your CV along with a short voice recording introducing your relevant experience. (Use Vacaroo for your voice recording and just attach the link)



: 

Subj: MedVA (Surgery Nurse Background)

 1. How many years of hospital nursing experience do you have? Kindly specify your surgical experience.

title: Patient Services Representative - 100% Remote
description:

We are seeking a highly skilled Patient Services Representative with extensive medical billing experience to support our dermatology clients. This role is critical to both patient satisfaction and revenue performance. You will serve as the primary point of contact for patients with billing-related questions, while also identifying and resolving underlying insurance and claims issues.
