title: Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly strategic, tech-forward Business Analyst to serve as the connective tissue between stakeholders, operations, and IT execution. This role is responsible for identifying business bottlenecks, architecting scalable system solutions, and driving technology initiatives that elevate performance across the entire organization.



This is not a passive documentation role. This person must think like an operator.



The ideal candidate understands Agency operations deeply, sees operational inefficiencies before they become problems, and can translate business complexity into executable IT projects. Amazon account management, listing optimization, and PPC experience is a strong asset. They must be comfortable challenging assumptions, aligning leadership on priorities, and guiding technical teams toward high-impact outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead discovery sessions to uncover operational constraints and workflow inefficiencies.

- Analyze processes end-to-end, mapping current and future workflows for scalability.

- Translate business challenges into project charters, requirements, and actionable plans.

- Collaborate with IT to validate feasibility, manage resources, and oversee execution.

- Identify automation and AI opportunities to improve operations, reporting, and content.

- Enhance systems, dashboards, CRMs, and cross-platform integrations for efficiency.

- Develop scalable SOPs, optimize workflows, and increase output without adding headcount.

- Serve as liaison between technical and non-technical teams, driving alignment and supporting change management.



Qualifications:

- 4+ years experience in Business Analysis, Systems Strategy, Operations Strategy, or similar high-impact role

- Strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central operations

- Proven experience leading cross-functional IT initiatives from discovery to launch

- Strong technical literacy (APIs, automation tools, CRM systems, system integrations)

- Experience working directly with developers and technical teams

- Strong documentation and process-mapping skills

- Excellent executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills

- Strategic thinker with the ability to balance short-term fixes with long-term scalability

- Computer engineering/science background or equivalent experience



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Excited to make a real impact and drive business growth through systems, automation, and strategy? If this role feels like the right fit for you, don’t wait—apply now and join a team where your expertise truly shapes the future.



Have questions or want to follow up on your application? Reach out to us anytime at

title: FREIGHT BROKER/ PARTNER AGENT
description:
**Job Title: Freight Broker Agent/Sales Representative (Own Book of Business)**



**Company: TSI**

** Based in the US**



**Location: Remote



**About Us:**

TSI is a leading name in the logistics industry, offering customized freight and transportation solutions. We are seeking experienced Freight Broker Agents or Sales Representatives with their own book of business to join our expanding team. If you're a driven professional with a solid network and a passion for freight, this is an excellent opportunity to grow your business with the support of a top-tier logistics company.



**Responsibilities:**

- **Excellent Communication Skills:** Strong verbal and written communication for effective negotiation and relationship management.

- **Negotiation Expertise:** Skilled in negotiating rates and terms with clients and carriers to create profitable and competitive agreements.

- **Self-Motivated:** Independent, with a proactive approach to driving sales and business growth.

- **Tech-Savvy:** Proficient with logistics software and freight management tools.

- **Industry Knowledge:** Solid understanding of freight brokerage, transportation, and supply chain processes.

- **Customer-Centric:** Committed to providing excellent service and fostering long-term partnerships.



**What TSI Offers:**



- **Competitive Commission Structure:** Lucrative compensation plan with no earnings cap.

- **Industry-Leading Tools:** Leverage cutting-edge logistics platforms and resources to streamline your operations.

- **Growth Opportunity:** Join a company committed to your professional growth and long-term success.

If you're an experienced freight broker with a book of business and a passion for logistics, TSI wants to hear from you. Join us and take your freight brokerage career to the next level!

title: Launch Operations Coordinator for Brand Development & Training Company
description:
Our Company:

THE BRAND HUSTLER is a fast-moving, results-driven startup helping entrepreneurs build standout brands through launches, events, and experiences. Our culture is rooted in ownership — everyone on our team thinks like a founder, moves with urgency, and takes pride in executing at a high level. We celebrate wins loudly, learn fast, and never wait for perfection to act.



The Role:

The Launch Operations Coordinator (LOC) is the architect and executor behind every launch, event, and live experience within The Brand Hustler ecosystem — from virtual bootcamps and challenges to our signature in-person tour and Brand Takeoff. You’ll ensure every launch runs like clockwork, leveraging data, checklists, and cross-team coordination to drive seamless execution and next-level outcomes.



Mission: Keep the launch machine running — from pre-launch prep to post-launch reporting — ensuring every experience is delivered on time, on brand, and on target.

Success in this role means: The CEO never worries about funnels, launch data, or timeline execution during a live launch.



Before You Apply — Read This Carefully

The Brand Hustler operates on five core values. This role is not for someone who wants a checklist job. It’s for someone who wants ownership.



1. Big-Brand Mindset / Ownership

We think like founders, not employees.

If something breaks, you fix it or escalate it before it impacts revenue.

You don’t wait for permission to improve excellence.



2. Elevated Experience

“Premium” is our baseline.

Details matter. Systems must be clean. Execution must feel intentional.



3. Hard Work Pays Off

We work hard, and we win hard.

When launches succeed, the team shares in the reward.



4. Rawness Matters

We communicate directly and professionally.

We speak up early. Silence is more expensive than discomfort.



5. Impact

Every launch affects livelihoods.

We execute with precision because results ripple.

If these standards energize you — not intimidate you — keep reading.



The Launch Operations Coordinator Owns:

1. Funnel & Automation Execution

Build, update, and QA all Kartra funnels for every launch

Ensure tagging,
 automations, payment flows, and community access are fully operational

Conduct pre-launch system checks and live-launch monitoring



2. Launch Data & Performance Intelligence

Track real-time registration, attendance, conversion, and upsell metrics

Maintain Launch Performance Dashboard

Deliver 72-hour post-launch report with insights + optimization recommendations



3. Launch Timeline & Team Coordination

Build and manage launch timelines in 

Ensure all deliverables are completed on schedule

Proactively communicate delays and enforce accountability

Escalate risks before they become problems



4. Operational Flexibility

Proactively resolve minor operational gaps (light edits, quick system fixes, coordination tasks) to prevent friction during launch cycles as needed to ensure seamless execution





You Must Understand or Be a Fast Learner of These Tools:

Kartra (our funnel backends and data live on this)

Canva (for small design tasks related to workbooks and presentations)

Google Drive (docs organization, form creation, data reporting on sheets, resource sharing, etc)


 (project management and event team task tracking)

Zapier (for automation and third-party tool connections)



Knowledge of ClickFunnels and Skool is nice to have.



Hours & Compensation (WE ARE ON U.S. Eastern Time!):

Standard: 10–20 hours per week (one week per month may be higher, see below)

Event Weeks: Up to 30 hrs/week during live launch or event execution weeks (including evenings/weekends as needed for real-time support).



This is a launch-driven role. Our company runs monthly virtual launches and periodic in-person events, so consistency and flexibility are essential.



Growth: As launch volume and revenue scale, this role may expand in scope, hours, and compensation for high-performing tea
mbers.

s using our pre-designed templates. You’ll work with our brand guidelines, product photos, and Canva to make the
s visually appealing, product-forward, and on-brand inside Omnisend (training provided).



This is a one-time project with clear deliverables and creative freedom within the brand guidelines. Ideal for someone who understands
 layout/design, has an eye for aesthetics, and can follow content direction with minimal micromanagement.



PROJECT DELIVERABLES:

A) 3
 Campaigns (4
s per campaign = 12 total
s)

B) Each
 customized using our templates + brand assets

C) Fully designed and input into OmniSend



WHAT YOU’LL DO:

- Design 12
s using our drag-and-drop
 templates (3–4 template pages per
)

- Apply our brand color palette, fonts, and visual tone (not just plug & play—must make it look good)

- Use our brand product photos plus Canva stock imagery + GiFs to create cohesive visuals

- Use your design judgment to break up text, highlight key messages, and avoid “text blocks”

- Load all 12
s into OmniSend, including:

- Visual formatting

- Links/buttons

- Mobile responsiveness

- Subject lines + preview text (optional, templates provided)

- Prep for CEO review and final polish



REQUIREMENTS:

- Solid Canva skills + ability to find free stock images that match a luxury, feminine, modern brand vibe

- Good understanding of color theory, text hierarchy, and product-forward layout design

- Ability to follow brand guidelines and make
s feel cohesive

- Fluent in English and can understand nuance in tone

- Experience with Klaviyo or Omnisend (bonus—but not required if you’re a fast learner)

- You must be comfortable interpreting content direction and turning blocks of text into an engaging layout



TOOLS YOU’LL USE:

Canva

Omnisend (training provided)

Google Drive

Brand asset folder (photos, logos, hex codes, typography)



TIMELINE & COMMITMENT

Project begins: ASAP

Deadline: 2–3 weeks from start

Estimated hours: 15–20 total



BUDGET

Open to hourly proposals if preferred

Future project opportunities for strong performance 



TO APPLY:

1. Samples of your
 design or visual layout work (Canva or
 builder)

2. A short explanation of your design experience

3. Your rate (flat or hourly)

4. Your estimated turnaround time for 12
s

title: Social Media Assistant for Instagram (Project-Based)
description:
PROJECT OVERVIEW

We’re hiring a creative and skilled Instagram Content Creator + Video Editor to help us batch a month’s worth of content for a trendy digital product & stationary brand for entrepreneurs who need help launching, growing, and organizing their business.



This one-time project involves designing and editing 30 total Instagram posts, including carousels, quotes, definitions, and Reels. You’ll also set up up to 5 ManyChat automation flows tied to specific posts, including follow-up messages based on user interaction (like buying or not buying).



If you have an eye for design, basic video editing skills, and some automation know-how—or the ability to learn it quickly—you’ll love this creative, structured project.



PROJECT TIMELINE & SCOPE:

Deliverables:

30 total posts (Carousels, Reels, Quotes, Definitions)

5 ManyChat flows with full follow-up logic

Format: All content delivered in a single batch

Posting: CEO handles posting/scheduling (you don’t need to publish)

Timeline: 10–14 days from start

Estimated time: ~30–35 hours (total project)



WHAT YOU’LL DO (ALL BATCHED):

1. Design + Customize 30 Instagram Posts (most have templates already):

2. Edit 10 Instagram Reels (Basic Video Editing):

3. Build 5 ManyChat Automations (Trigger + Follow-Up):

- Setup trigger based on IG comment (e.g., “Comment PLANNER”)

- Build follow-up message for buyers and non buyers

- You’ll receive sample flow references; execution is expected (not from scratch)



CEO PROVIDES:

- Full post ideas + copy

- Videos of her to Use in Reels (you can add other video as well)

- Brand photos, Canva templates, product shots, and style references

- Sample ManyChat automation examples or video tutorials

- Approved trending sound list

- Final review + proofing before posting (you don’t need to post)



YOU’RE A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

Know Canva well and can design clean, modern, engaging posts

Have video editing experience using CapCut, InShot, VN, or similar

Understand how to visually format content for a product-based audience

Can follow creative inspiration and apply on-brand formatting

Have used—or are confident learning—ManyChat (training references provided)

Are organized, communicative, and ready to work independently



TO APPLY:

Please send:



1. A few Canva or IG post design samples (carousels, static, or reel covers)

2. 1–2 examples of your video editing work (Reels/TikToks, etc.)

3. Note any experience with ManyChat (or similar tools)

4. Your rate + timeline to complete

5. If you're open to future work

title: UI/UX Web Designer
description:
We are seeking a talented and creative UI/UX Web Designer with a strong background in visual design and user experience. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating intuitive and engaging user interfaces for our web applications and platforms. 



If you’re passionate about design and want to create impactful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

- Wireframing and Prototyping: Create wireframes, prototypes, and mockups to visualize design concepts and user flows, ensuring that the design meets user needs and business goals.

- User Research: Conduct user research and usability testing to gather insights and validate design concepts, ensuring that user needs are met.

- Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to design user-centered solutions that enhance the overall user experience..

- Visual Design: Develop the visual aspects of the website, including color schemes, typography, and layout, to create an aesthetically pleasing and cohesive user interface.

- Interaction Design: Designing interactive elements of the website, such as buttons, forms, and navigation, to enhance user engagement and improve usability.

- Usability Testing: Conducting usability tests to gather feedback on design prototypes and making iterative improvements based on user feedback.

- Responsive Design: Ensuring that the website is responsive and provides a seamless experience across various devices and screen sizes.

- Feedback Incorporation: Iterate designs based on user feedback and analytics to continuously improve the user experience.

- Documentation: Create and maintain design documentation, style guides, and design systems to ensure consistency across all products.

- Stay Current: Keeping abreast of industry trends, tools, and best practices in UI/UX design to continuously improve skills and design quality.



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 2+ years of experience in UI/UX design roles, ideally with a focus on web applications or websites.

- A degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field.

- Certifications in UI/UX design or related disciplines can be beneficial.

- Strong portfolio showcasing design projects that highlight your problem-solving skills and creativity in UI/UX design.

- Proficiency in design and prototyping tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Sketch, Figma, or similar software.

- Understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to effectively communicate with developers.

- Experience in conducting user research, usability testing, and gathering user feedback to inform design decisions.

- Solid understanding of user-centered design principles and methodologies.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present and explain design concepts to various stakeholders.

- Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Ready to transform the way we work and drive real results? If this role excites you, don’t wait—apply today and be part of a team where your ideas make a difference.



Questions or need to follow up? Contact us at

title: Executive Assistant in Marketing (Full time/Remote)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a confident, hands-on Growth Marketing Manager to own our end-to-end investor marketing efforts.



This role is for someone who knows how to build demand, generate qualified leads, and make smart marketing decisions independently—not someone who waits for step-by-step instructions.



If you enjoy blending strategy + execution, care about results, and are comfortable working within financial/compliance guidelines, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage investor-focused marketing campaigns (content,
, digital, partnerships, events)

• Create and manage lead magnets, nurture sequences, and authority content (guides, case studies, webinars)

• D
 which channels, content, and offers to prioritize (within approved budget and compliance rules)

• Track performance and optimize based on data (leads, cost per lead, conversions)

• Work closely with Investor Relations, leadership, and legal/compliance



Required Skills and Experience

• Laptop or desktop (maximum 3 years service)

• CPU: Intel i5 (10th Gen or higher) or AMD Ryzen 5+

• Internet: 50–100 Mbps with backup connection

• Working webcam, microphone, and headset



How To Apply

 your application to

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Living in Middle Georgia Real Estate



We are looking for a high-level, full-time Social Media Manager to take ownership of our content pipeline, video distribution, and online lead engagement. This role is ideal for someone who understands real estate marketing, short-form and long-form video strategy, and how to turn social media into consistent business.

1.Content & Video Management

- Coordinate our video workflow from start to finish

- Review and approve final edits for quality and brand consistency

- Upload and optimize content on YouTube and
 (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)

- Repurpose long-form videos into shorts and clips



2. Posting & Brand Consistency

- Post listings, closings, under contracts, client wins, and local business features

- Perform keyword research for YouTube,
, and TikTok

- Monitor and respond to
 Messenger, YouTube comments, and social media inquiries

- Tag and route leads to our CRM/team promptly

- Maintain a professional, friendly response style

- Ensure photos, posts, and reviews stay current



*** Ideal Candidate ***



- Experience managing social media for real estate, media, or local business

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple content deadlines

title: Podcast Editor (Video / Audio)
description:
Contract | Remote

Pay Rage per e



Sofia Health produces a high-quality, editorially driven podcast focused on health, wellness, medicine, and culture. Our guests include physicians, authors, researchers, and industry leaders. We’re looking for an experienced Podcast Editor (audio + video) who can deliver polished, professional episodes in 1–2 revision rounds—not endless back-and-forth.



This role is for someone who understands story, pacing, and clarity, not just cutting dead air.



What You’ll Be Editing

--Long-form podcast episodes (audio + video)

--Multi-camera or single-camera interviews

--Episodes with physician and author guests (accuracy matters)

--Short-form clips (3–4 per episode) for social and promotion



Responsibilities

--Edit full podcast episodes (audio & video) with strong narrative flow

--Clean and balance audio (levels, EQ, noise reduction, consistency)

--Edit video for pacing, clarity, and professionalism (cuts, framing, flow)

--Follow specific edit notes embedded in recordings

--Make editorial decisions when answers are long, repetitive, or unclear

--Flag content issues (rambling, off-topic sections, unclear phrasing)

--Export final assets correctly and on time

--Deliver episodes that are ready to publish, not “almost there”



Required Skills & Experience

--2–3+ years professional podcast editing experience (audio + video)

--Strong command of spoken English (must understand nuance, tone, and context)

--Proven ability to shape conversations—not just cut mistakes

--Experience with long-form interview content

--Excellent attention to detail and listening skills

--Ability to follow instructions and think independently

--Comfortable working with feedback and tightening edits efficiently



Non-Negotiables

--Quality must be delivered within 1–2 edit rounds

--Numerous revision cycles are not acceptable

--You must actually listen to the full episode



You must catch:

--Repetition

--Rambling answers

--Words used out of context

--Awkward transitions

--Missed instructions or sloppy edits will not be a fit

title: UI/UX Web Designer
description:
We are seeking a talented and creative UI/UX Web Designer with a strong background in visual design and user experience. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating intuitive and engaging user interfaces for our web applications and platforms.



If you’re passionate about design and want to create impactful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

- Wireframing and Prototyping: Create wireframes, prototypes, and mockups to visualize design concepts and user flows, ensuring that the design meets user needs and business goals.

- User Research: Conduct user research and usability testing to gather insights and validate design concepts, ensuring that user needs are met.

- Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to design user-centered solutions that enhance the overall user experience..

- Visual Design: Develop the visual aspects of the website, including color schemes, typography, and layout, to create an aesthetically pleasing and cohesive user interface.

- Interaction Design: Designing interactive elements of the website, such as buttons, forms, and navigation, to enhance user engagement and improve usability.

- Usability Testing: Conducting usability tests to gather feedback on design prototypes and making iterative improvements based on user feedback.

- Responsive Design: Ensuring that the website is responsive and provides a seamless experience across various devices and screen sizes.

- Feedback Incorporation: Iterate designs based on user feedback and analytics to continuously improve the user experience.

- Documentation: Create and maintain design documentation, style guides, and design systems to ensure consistency across all products.

- Stay Current: Keeping abreast of industry trends, tools, and best practices in UI/UX design to continuously improve skills and design quality.



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 2+ years of experience in UI/UX design roles, ideally with a focus on web applications or websites.

- A degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field.

- Certifications in UI/UX design or related disciplines can be beneficial.

- Strong portfolio showcasing design projects that highlight your problem-solving skills and creativity in UI/UX design.

- Proficiency in design and prototyping tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Sketch, Figma, or similar software.

- Understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to effectively communicate with developers.

- Experience in conducting user research, usability testing, and gathering user feedback to inform design decisions.

- Solid understanding of user-centered design principles and methodologies.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present and explain design concepts to various stakeholders.

- Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Ready to transform the way we work and drive real results? If this role excites you, don’t wait—apply today and be part of a team where your ideas make a difference.



Questions or need to follow up? Contact us at

title: Take Off Specialist
description:
Take-Off Specialist (Roofing Estimator – Remote)



Company: Smart Roofing

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time or Contract

Industry: Residential & Commercial Roofing



Position Overview



Smart Roofing is seeking a detail-oriented Take-Off Specialist to perform accurate material quantity take-offs and assist in estimating roofing projects.



This role is critical to profitability. Precision, speed, and the ability to read plans correctly are mandatory. You will be responsible for reviewing architectural drawings, measuring roof areas, identifying scope requirements, and preparing material lists to support bidding and production.



Key Responsibilities

Plan Review & Quantity Take-Offs



Analyze architectural and structural drawings

Perform detailed roof take-offs (shingles, tile, TPO, modified, metal, etc.)

Measure squares, pitch factors, waste factors, flashing, underlayment, and accessories

Identify penetrations, crickets, valleys, transitions, and specialty details

Prepare complete material lists for ordering

Estimating Support

Assist in preparing bids and proposals

Verify scope accuracy before submission

Identify potential omissions or risk areas

Coordinate with suppliers for pricing when needed

Software & Tools

Work with PDFs, blueprints, and satellite measurements

Maintain organized digital job files

Required Qualifications

2+ years experience in roofing take-offs or estimating

Ability to read and interpret construction drawings

Strong understanding of roofing systems (residential and/or commercial)

Experience calculating waste factors and pitch multipliers

High attention to detail and accuracy

Proficient with take-off software

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with insurance restoration projects

Knowledge of Southern California building codes

Familiarity with Xactimate (for insurance work)

Field roofing experience (installer background is a plus)

Performance Expectations

Accurate take-offs with minimal revision requests

Fast turnaround time on bid requests

Clear communication of scope gaps or design conflicts

Contribution to improved bid win rate and profit margins

Compensation

Competitive salary or per-project pay

Performance-based bonus for accuracy and turnaround time

Opportunity for long-term growth

How to Apply

Please submit:

Resume

Software experience list

Sample take-off (if available)

Estimated turnaround time for a standard residential re-roof

If you'd like, I can:

Make this more aggressive and performance-driven

Tailor it for hiring in Mexico (lower cost remote)

Structure it for Upwork/Fiverr

Add KPI-based compensation tied to bid margin

Combine take-off + bidding responsibilities into one role

title: Real Estate Acquisitions
description:
Real Estate Acquisition Specialist (Mid-Term Rentals)



About the Role



I work 1-on-1 with clients to help them purchase and launch high-performing mid-term rental (MTR) properties — think Airbnb, but designed for 30+ day stays (traveling professionals, nurses, corporate tenants, etc.).



I am looking to hire someone for this position as a long-term role. This is not a short-term contract or temporary position — I’m building a team and want someone who wants to grow with the business.



As an Acquisition Specialist, your primary responsibility will be sourcing, underwriting, and presenting strong investment opportunities that fit each client’s specific “buy box.”



Each client will have clearly defined criteria including:



Target market



Price range



Property type



Age of property



Layout requirements



Return expectations



Your job is to find properties that match those criteria and determine whether they are strong investment opportunities.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Searching daily on platforms like Zillow, Redfin, etc.



Identifying properties that match each client’s buy box



Underwriting properties using our internal tools and calculators



Preparing clean, organized deal summaries for review



Managing multiple clients across multiple markets at once



Communicating directly with listing agents (phone + text) to gather key details



Tracking all opportunities in an organized system



Moving quickly — great deals don’t wait



Once you underwrite and prepare the deal, I will review it and present it to the client.



Who This Is For



This role is ideal for someone who:



Is analytical and numbers-driven



Understands basic real estate investing principles (cash flow, ROI, etc.)



Is highly organized and detail-oriented



Can juggle multiple clients and markets simultaneously



Is comfortable communicating professionally with real estate agents



Moves fast and follows up consistently



This is not just a “property search” role. This is an investment analysis role.



Must speak great English as you will be talking over the phone with real estate agents



Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience underwriting rental properties



Experience with short-term or mid-term rentals



Experience working with investors





Please answer the following questions while applying:



1. Have you worked in a real estate role before?

If yes, explain specifically what you did in detail (acquisitions, underwriting, comps, cold calling, MLS searches, etc.).

If you have never worked in real estate, please do not apply.



2. Are you fluent in English and comfortable speaking with U.S. real estate agents on the phone?

Please confirm and attach a short 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself.



3. This is a full-time position (40 hours/week), 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. EST, Monday–Friday.

Does this schedule work for you long term?



4. What tools have you used for property research or underwriting?

(Zillow, Redfin, MLS, Propstream, AirDNA, Excel, Google Sheets, etc.)

Be specific.



5. What immediate questions do you have about this position?

title: Friendly & Flexible Remote Graphic Designer Role
description:
Hello!



We’re a small, friendly Australian printing company that specialises in real estate marketing materials — especially our popular fridge magnet calendars.



We’re looking for a reliable and experienced Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who enjoys working from home and wants steady, ongoing work with a supportive team.



If you’re someone who:



* Enjoys organised, structured design work



* Takes pride in neat, accurate files



* Likes working independently without being micromanaged



* Prefers stable weekly income rather than one-off projects



* Values flexibility and work-life balance



… then this role could be a great fit for you ????



? What You’ll Be Doing......



* Designing fridge magnet calendars (our main product)



* Creating business cards and other print materials



* Preparing print-ready artwork in Adobe Illustrator



* Following brand style guides carefully



* Setting up correct bleeds, margins, crop marks, and die-cuts



* Occasionally removing backgrounds from photos



Most of our work follows clear templates and brand guides — so if you enjoy structured design rather than constantly inventing from scratch, you’ll probably love this role.



???? Skills Needed



* Strong experience in Adobe Illustrator (very important)



* Working knowledge of Adobe InDesign



* Understanding of print setup (CMYK, bleeds, crop marks, etc.)



* Good attention to detail



* Comfortable communicating in English



???? Work Style & Flexibility



This is a remote, work-from-home position.



We have busy seasons during the year (when calendars are in high demand), and quieter periods as well. During peak times, we need someone calm and dependable who can handle higher workloads. During slower times, the pace is more relaxed.



We don’t micromanage. If you’re responsible and self-motivated, you’ll have flexibility in how you manage your time.



???? Pay Starting at PHP 7,000 per week - Review after 3 months based on performance



Long-term opportunity for the right person



We’re really looking for someone who wants stability and to grow with us.



???? How to Apply



Initially, please send:



* Your resume



* A short introduction about yourself and your experience



* 3–5 samples of print-ready work you’ve created in Illustrator



* A short explanation of your experience preparing files for professional printing



Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a small paid sample task.



We genuinely value reliability, kindness, and good communication. If you’re looking for steady remote work with a respectful and supportive company, we’d love to hear from you.



Thank you, and hopefully we can chat soon ????

title: Rockstar Virtual Assistant NEEDED for Parenting Startup
description:
Tot Squad is a fast-growing parenting support startup on a mission to make life easier for new and expecting parents. We connect families with trusted experts—from sleep coaches and lactation consultants to car seat safety pros—through our online marketplace and partnerships with major retailers like Target.



We’re hiring two smart, proactive, long-term virtual assistants from the Philippines to support our founder, help scale our operations, and grow with our team. If you’re a self-starter who takes initiative, loves checklists, and has a heart for helping families, this might be your dream job.



This role is communication-heavy (both oral and written). All candidates must be fluent in English, with little to no accent, and confident in both written and verbal communication. If you’re the kind of person who picks up the phone without hesitation and writes polished
s with perfect grammar—you're exactly who we’re looking for. The ideal candidate is outgoing, highly organized, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced environment.



Most of the women on our team are moms, and we all love what we do. This isn’t just a job—it’s a career. We’re looking for someone who wants a long-term role with room to learn, grow, and thrive as part of a supportive, mission-driven team.



*** Schedule & Compensation

20 hours/week per VA (2 VAs cross-trained), or 40 hours/week for 1 highly experienced VA



Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PT (12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT)



Candidates with prior U.S. graveyard shift experience will be prioritized



Pay: PHP 20,000–40,000/month depending on experience



Paid monthly via PayPal



Includes 6 paid U.S. holidays



Long-term growth potential and bonuses for excellent performance



*** What You’ll Do

Your daily tasks will include a mix of personal and professional responsibilities, such as:



Sending a morning priorities list and end-of-day recap



Booking/rescheduling appointments (doctors, dentists, travel, etc.)



Following up with vendors, insurance companies, and service providers



Paying bills and handling basic accounting



Triaging and responding to
s, managing calendars



Social media posting, comment moderation, PR and influencer outreach



Customer service support via
 or Zendesk



Reviewing Zoom transcripts and drafting follow-up
s



Tracking unanswered
s and following up to keep 
ntum



Purchasing gifts, ordering holiday cards, and maintaining an address book



*** You’re a Great Fit If You…

Are fluent in spoken and written English, with excellent grammar and understanding of idioms/slang



Communicate clearly and frequently, and are comfortable on Zoom/video calls



Take full ownership of your work, with strong follow-through and attention to detail



Use time-tracking tools and provide honest, regular updates



Are extremely tech-savvy and a fast learner (ChatGPT experience is a bonus!)



Thrive in fast-paced, constantly evolving environments



Have the ability to place and receive U.S. calls during work hours and conference multiple callers



Are proficient with Gmail, Google Drive, LastPass, ToDoist, Zoom, Loom, Slack, and Canva



Stay on top of tasks and deadlines without needing reminders



Are excited to support a mission-driven, all-female startup team



Exercise discretion with personal vs. company-related tasks



Have a well-lit, quiet, dedicated home office with stable internet and a reliable computer



Are not responsible for childcare or other jobs during work hours; if hired full-time, this must be your only job



*** Why Join Tot Squad?

We’re a team of smart, supportive women (many of us moms!) committed to helping families thrive. You’ll be part of a fast-growing, purpose-driven company where your voice matters, your work is valued, and there’s plenty of room to grow. We believe in teamwork, integrity, and cheering each other on.



* How to Apply

If this sounds like you, please send:



Your resume



A short note explaining why you’re a great fit, including any relevant writing or phone experience



Top candidates will be invited to submit:



A 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself



A brief story about a time you went above and beyond for a boss, coworker, or client



We can’t wait to meet you and welcome you into the squad!

nts that stop the scroll and drive action.



The Role

We’re looking for an experienced freelance editor with a proven track record creating high-performing Meta and TikTok ads. This role is about more than just cutting clips — we want someone who understands how to:



Stop the scroll in the first seconds.



Drive engagement and purchases with strong hooks, pacing, captions, and CTAs.



Take RAW UGC and turn it into polished ads.



Take existing ads and make them stronger through smart recuts and refinements.



Learn our brand voice and style, then run with it without needing constant direction.



What You’ll Do



Deliver weekly batches of short-form video ads (15s + 30s) across 9x16 and 1x1 formats.



Create recuts of existing ads with new hooks, captions, and energy.



Produce supporting static creatives in standard ad sizes.



Follow proven best practices while experimenting with fresh approaches.



What We’re Looking For



Proven success editing Meta and TikTok ad creatives.



A portfolio that shows you know how to make ads that convert.



Strong grasp of storytelling, editing for emotion, and building urgency.



Ability to work independently with minimal hand-holding while meeting weekly deadlines.



What We Provide



A steady stream of assets (RAW UGC, templates, examples).



Clear brand guidelines and references to top-performing ads.



Ongoing work with room to grow if it’s a strong fit.



How to Apply



Share examples of Meta/TikTok ads you’ve edited that drove results.



Briefly describe your experience with UGC-style editing and ad optimization.



Confirm availability for consistent weekly deliverables.

Cairde Designs

Cameron Denny LinkedIn

title: Track & Trace Specialist
description:
About Us

GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and refrigerated freight, operating with real time visibility, disciplined execution, proactive risk management, clear communication, and structured accountability to keep freight organized, controlled, and moving cleanly from pickup to delivery because this role is not just about monitoring, but about proactive operational control.



Role Overview

As the Track & Trace Specialist assigned to our dedicated load, you serve as the dedicated operational control point for all shipments, ensuring continuous visibility, proactive risk identification, strict documentation enforcement, compliance oversight, and disciplined escalation. You will manage multiple systems simultaneously, maintain structured communication protocols, and uphold customer standards without exception. This role requires precision, urgency, and comfort operating within a highly structured environment where service integrity is paramount.



What You'll Do

• Monitor all Altman loads via live ELD tracking, GPS tracking, TMS, and Internal System

• Maintain continuous stop progression and milestone visibility

• Identify service risks early (late arrivals, dwell exposure, HOS risk, routing deviations)

• Ensure carrier assignments are active and tracking properly

• Manage and document all driver/dispatcher communication 
 and communication channels)

• Execute structured check-call protocols: depart shipper, pre-stop arrival, depart each stop, final ETA

• Log all activity accurately in TMS and Internal system

• Upload and organize required documentation (PODs, packing slips, receiving stickers, service records)

• Confirm compliance with customer-specific delivery protocols before load closeout

• Proactively escalate risks before service failure

• Coordinate roadside repair services when necessary

• Log all service events in TMS/Internal System

• Escalate DEFCON level events with root cause summary, mitigation steps, and resolution plan

• Coordinate with Booking Team and Dispatch on time-sensitive loads

• Execute structured shift handoffs (Zoom + written documentation)

• Maintain accurate load dashboards

• Follow SOPs with disciplined consistency



What Success Looks Like

• On-Time Performance Percentage

• Documentation Turnaround Time

• Escalation Timing (early detection rate)

• I
 Frequency & Resolution Quality

• Dashboard Accuracy & Update Timeliness

• Clean Shift Handoff Compliance



Who We’re Looking For

• Experience in U.S. logistics, freight brokerage, or track & trace

• Familiar with US trucking operations and geography

• Comfortable working across multiple live systems simultaneously

• Highly detail oriented with strong prioritization skills

• Clear and professional written communication

• Strong urgency awareness in live freight environments

• Structured, process-driven, and coachable

• Able to escalate appropriately without hesitation

• Maintains composure under operational pressure

• Type at least 50 WPM



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems with defined operational discipline

• Hands-on leadership and direct feedback

• KPI driven growth path

• Clear performance expectations

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full-Time Remote | Direct Hire to U.S. Company

• Monday - Friday 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST/CDT (San Antonio, Texas time)

• Zoom presence required (camera on, audio unmuted)

• Time tracking software used for accountability



This position is built for someone who enjoys controlling live operations, enforcing structure, identifying risk before failure, and maintaining execution discipline across every load. If you value precision, urgency, and operational accountability, you will fit well here.



Apply Here


/team/
/TrackAndTraceQA



Visit us:

title: Pokémon Card Market Research Analyst
description:
About the Role

I'm a UK-based Pokémon card trader with an established, profitable operation looking for a detail-oriented Research Analyst to help me scale. I've been trading PSA 10 graded cards and sealed products for a while now with strong returns - this isn't a speculative side project, it's a proven business that I need the right person to help grow.

This is a part-time role to start (a few hours per day) as we build a working relationship and prove the concept together, with scope to increase hours significantly as the project scales.

You'll be searching eBay and other marketplaces to find undervalued PSA 10 graded Pokémon cards and sealed products. Your research will directly drive purchasing decisions, so accuracy and attention to detail are critical.

As we grow, the role has potential to expand beyond card sourcing into broader personal assistant responsibilities - travel booking, scheduling, and general business support. I'm looking for someone who wants to grow with the business long-term, not just fill a task list.

Prior Pokémon card knowledge is a bonus but not required - I'll train you on exactly what to look for.



What You'll Be Doing:

Daily Sourcing



Search eBay for PSA 10 Pokémon cards and sealed packs/products using filters like "ending soonest" to catch undervalued auctions before they close

Focus on vintage cards and modern cards that are at least 2 years old - we avoid anything newer due to price volatility

Primary buying markets: UK and Japan (lower shipping, prices already in £/¥, minimal customs). Occasionally Europe (Belgium, Netherlands, Italy) when the deal is right. US purchases are rare due to import costs

Target price range is typically £100-£5,000, though flag exceptional deals at any price point

PSA 10 graded slabs and sealed packs/products only - no loose or ungraded cards



Research & Analysis



For every potential purchase, check comparable sold prices on eBay (last 90 days), current lowest listings, PriceCharting, and Collectr

Check PSA Population Reports to assess how rare the card is at grade 10

Verify PSA certification numbers on PSA's website to confirm the slab is genuine

Calculate total landed cost: purchase price, shipping, currency conversion, and any import fees

Assess sales velocity - how quickly similar cards actually sell



Auction Bidding



A key part of this role is placing bids and sniping auctions on my behalf while I'm asleep. You'll use Gixen (an auction sniping tool) to queue bids at agreed maximum prices, and in some cases place manual bids on auctions ending during your shift

I need someone I can trust with purchasing decisions within pre-agreed parameters. Over time, as you learn the market, you'll gain more autonomy on what to bid on and at what price



Reporting



Complete a nightly sourcing sheet (template provided) with all findings. Each entry must include: card details, cert number, purchase price, shipping and import costs, comp data, PSA population, estimated profit, seller reputation, and your recommendation (Buy / Snipe / Skip)

Update the sheet with auction outcomes each morning





Working Hours & Communication



Communication is via WhatsApp or
 - quick, direct, no formality needed

I'm available from 8:00 AM to midnight UK time (GMT/BST) every day

Ideal working pattern: you work during your daytime hours (which covers UK late evening and overnight), sourcing cards and placing bids on auctions that end while I'm asleep

I review your sourcing sheet each morning and approve purchases within a few hours

For time-sensitive deals or Buy It Now opportunities, message me on WhatsApp and I'll usually respond quickly during my waking hours





Compensation & Growth

Base Pay



$4–$6/hour USD depending on experience (negotiable for strong candidates)

Part-time to start (a few hours per day), with clear path to increased hours as we grow

Paid training period - I'll teach you the market from scratch if needed



Profit Share



10% of net profits on cards you source, paid monthly

This is on top of your hourly rate, not instead of it

If you find a card I buy for £500 and sell for £1,000, you earn $4–6/hr for the time spent PLUS 10% of the profit (£50)

The better you get at spotting deals, the more you earn - your incentives are directly aligned with mine



Co-Investment (Optional)



Once we've built a track record together, you'll have the option to co-invest in cards alongside me

This means putting your own money into cards we both agree are strong holds, and sharing in the upside when they sell

This is entirely optional and subject to mutual agreement - no pressure, but the opportunity is there if you want skin in the game





Requirements

Must Have



Strong English communication skills (written)

Experience with eBay - comfortable with auctions, Buy It Now, seller feedback, and search filters

Excellent attention to detail - one wrong digit on a cert number or missed shipping cost could mean a bad purchase

Proficiency with Google Sheets

Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently

Comfortable making time-sensitive bidding decisions within agreed parameters



Nice to Have



Experience in e-commerce sourcing, online arbitrage, or reselling

Familiarity with Pokémon cards, PSA grading, or collectibles

Experience with Japanese marketplaces (Yahoo Auctions Japan, Mercari Japan)

Interest in the Pokémon or trading card market (you'll learn fast if you're genuinely curious)





How to Apply

To show you have the right research skills, please include the following in your application:



A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

Your available working hours in Philippines time (or your local time zone)

Test Task: Find ONE PSA 10 Pokémon card currently listed on eBay that you believe is underpriced. Present it in this format:



Card name and set

PSA certification number

Listed price (and currency)

Link to listing

2–3 comparable sold prices from eBay

Why you think it's a good buy







This test task should take 15–20 minutes. It tells me far more about your skills than a CV ever could.



Why This Role Is Different

Most remote roles are repetitive data entry. This one is more like being a treasure hunter - you're scanning thousands of listings to find the diamonds in the rough. You'll learn a genuine skill in collectibles valuation, you'll share directly in the profits you generate, and as the business grows, so does your role and your earning potential. There's a clear path from market analyst to a broader right-hand role covering personal assistant and business operations. I'm building something real here and I want someone who's excited to be part of it.

title: Video Editor / VFX Editor
description:
About Detour Studios



Detour Studios is a fast-growing creative agency based in Montreal, working with a wide range of brands across e-commerce, hospitality, fitness, food & beverage, supplements, and startups. We create content built to perform — content that captures attention, tells a story, and drives results.



We’re a young, ambitious team that moves fast, thinks creatively, and cares deeply about quality. No two clients are the same, and no two days look the same either. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and want to be surrounded by people who are serious about creating standout work, you’ll fit right in.



The Role



We’re looking for a full-time Video Editor who is genuinely exceptional at editing short-form content.



This is not just a technical editing role — we’re looking for someone with strong creative instinct, great taste, and a deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and what makes content perform on social media. You’ll work closely with our videographers and creative team to turn raw footage into polished, engaging pieces built for platforms like Instagram and TikTok.



If you know how to make content feel sharp, intentional, and impossible to scroll past, we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Do

 • Edit high-quality short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and paid social campaigns

 • Shape the pacing, structure, and storytelling of each video to maximize engagement

 • Add captions, sound design, transitions, music, and visual elements that elevate the final product

 • Color correct footage and ensure a polished, brand-aligned final edit

 • Collaborate with videographers, strategists, and creatives to execute the vision behind each piece

 • Manage project files, organize footage, and work efficiently under tight deadlines

 • Incorporate feedback quickly without sacrificing creative quality

 • Stay current on trends, editing styles, and platform best practices in short-form content



What We’re Looking For

 • 2+ years of video editing experience, ideally in social media, content creation, or marketing

 • A strong portfolio that shows high-level short-form editing skill and creative range

 • Proficiency in editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or equivalent

 • Strong understanding of short-form storytelling, rhythm, hooks, pacing, and retention-focused editing

 • Great taste in editing choices, music selection, timing, and overall creative execution

 • Ability to work quickly, stay organized, and perform in a fast-moving agency environment

 • Detail-oriented, reliable, and open to feedback

 • Passion for content, branding, marketing, and digital storytelling

 • Experience with motion graphics, advanced sound design, or platform-specific editing styles is a strong plus



Why Join Detour

 • Join a young, creative, and highly driven team

 • Work on a wide variety of exciting brands and industries

 • Play a major role in shaping content that actually gets seen and performs

 • Grow with a rapidly expanding agency that values creativity and execution

 • Be part of a flexible, collaborative, and energetic work environment



Ready to Take the Detour?



If you’re a highly skilled editor who knows how to turn footage into content that grabs attention and keeps it, we’d love to see your work.



Apply now with your CV and portfolio.

description:

 graphics

title: Video Editor for Beauty/Curly Hair Content Creator (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)
description:
Hi! I’m Camryn, also known 
 online! I’m looking for a reliable and skilled video editor that can help me post more on social media



About Me

- Curly hair education & lifestyle content

- Based in Los Angeles, CA

- 75K+ combined following across TikTok & Instagram

- Actively partnering with brands (L'Oreal, Dyson, Dove, etc.)

- Existing editing style guide & brand guidelines already in place

- Linktree: 



---



The Role

A bit about the role: You would be doing short-form video editing starting at 3 videos a week. My goal is to scale up my content to 1-2 posts per day.



- Short-form video editing (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts)

- Starting at ~3 videos/week, scaling to 1-2 per day

- Follow established editing style guide (fonts, captions, colors, music, pacing)

- Receive briefs via Notion (hook, outline, script, notes per video)

- Raw footage delivered as multiple clips per video

- Repurpose existing footage independently — reframe the same clips with a new hook or angle without much guidance

- Example: turn a wash day routine into a separate "curly hair hack" video



---



What We're Looking For:



Must-Haves

- Portfolio demonstrating high-quality, original editing (no CapCut templates / plug-and-play)

- Ability to follow a detailed style guide precisely

- Strong sense of pacing, transitions, captions, and music selection

- Can work independently — not just assembling per instruction, but making creative decisions when repurposing content

- Comfortable with: Notion, WeTransfer, Google Drive

- Responsive communication — same-day replies, within ~12 hours

- 5+ hours of daily synchronous time overlap with Los Angeles (Pacific Time)

- Fast turnaround — no week-long back-and-forth on a single video



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience editing in the curly hair, beauty, or hair care niche

- Experience with a range of different creator clients

- Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve proficiency

- Understanding of short-form content strategy (hooks, retention, trends)



---



Compensation

- Hourly rate

- $2–$5/hr range (ideal: $2–$3/hr)

- Opportunity to scale hours as content volume grows



---



How to Apply

- Submit portfolio with examples across different clients/styles

- Highlight any beauty, hair, or lifestyle creator work

- Next steps: test edit of 
 video



---



Style Reference

- Kiana Davis — best friend tone, smooth transitions, strong pacing, well-placed captions

- Camryn's own editing style guide! - Will be shared with candidates to guide them on how to deliver the required quality.

title: Supplier Planner Coordinator
description:
About American Hat Makers



American Hat Makers has been crafting quality hats since 1972. We operate a fast-moving, multi-channel business — direct-to-consumer, Amazon, wholesale, and major retail partnerships including Bass Pro Shops — supported by a global supplier network across China, Mexico, and Ecuador.



We are a family-owned company that values accountability, speed, and high standards — and we take care of the people who help us grow.



About This Role



We are hiring a Supplier Planner–Coordinator to strengthen oversight between purchase order issuance and warehouse arrival.



Currently, quality or timeline issues are sometimes discovered too late — upon arrival in Texas instead of during production. This role exists to solve that gap.



You will:



Own daily communication with overseas suppliers



Track every open PO from issuance through ship confirmation



Conduct structured mid-production check-ins



Manage sample approvals and container visibility



Escalate risks early — not after delays occur



This is an execution-focused coordination role, not a strategy position. You’ll work closely with Operations, Purchasing, Production, and Sales.



Key Responsibilities

???? Supplier Communication & Accountability



Confirm all POs within 48 hours of issuance



Maintain proactive supplier communication 
, video, messaging)



Conduct scheduled mid-production check-ins



Manage top sample request, tracking, approval/rejection workflow



Escalate delays or risks early to Operations



???? PO & Production Tracking



Own and maintain the live PO tracking database



Monitor milestones: production start, completion, ship confirmation



Build quality buffer time before shipping



Flag orders at risk immediately



Coordinate with Purchasing for PO accuracy



???? Container & Inbound Logistics



Track inbound containers using communication tools and 



Monitor ETAs, port status, customs milestones



Share clear container status updates with the team



Flag delays, discrepancies, or holds



Reconcile shipments upon arrival



???? Cross-Functional Coordination



Manage multiple POs across suppliers and categories



Proactively communicate order status



Coordinate with Production on receiving timelines



Coordinate with Sales on urgency and delivery impact



Build and maintain clear SOP documentation



???? Data & Reporting



Maintain accurate procurement and supplier records



Generate regular open-PO and supplier performance reports



Ensure compliance documentation is organized and accessible



What We’re Looking For

? Language



English required



Mandarin preferred (not required) — China supplier communication is core to this role



? Project Management



Strong ability to manage multiple concurrent timelines



Think like a project manager (PMP not required)



Proactive problem surfacing



? Experience



1–3 years in procurement, purchasing, supply chain coordination, or vendor management



E-commerce or manufacturing background preferred



? Technical Skills



Comfortable with spreadsheets and databases



ERP familiarity is a plus



Quick learner with new tools



? Availability



Must work PST hours initially



Later shift adjustment aligned with China supplier time zone



? Mindset



Detail-oriented



Self-directed



Proactive communicator



Holds vendors accountable professionally



What You’ll Be Solving (Day-One Mandate)



Quality issues discovered too late



Communication gaps with China-based suppliers



Lack of structured mid-production check-ins



Limited inbound container visibility



Reactive supplier management instead of proactive accountability



Compensation & Details



Rate $800 (based on experience)

Hours 40 hrs/week

Pay Schedule Bi-weekly (every 14 days)

Shift Monday–Friday, starting 7:00 AM PST

Location Remote



How to Apply



???? Send your resume to:





Subject Line Format:

Supplier Planner–Coordinator | [Your Name]



Please include:



Resume highlighting procurement or coordination experience



Brief note on language capabilities and overseas supplier communication



Relevant experience in container tracking, ERP systems, or China-based suppliers

title: Advanced Short Form Video Editor  40–60 Reels Per Month
description:
Do not apply if you are a basic cutter.



I’m looking for a high-level short-form video editor who understands pacing, retention, psychology, and performance-based editing for Instagram Reels.



This is not simple trimming and captions.



You must know how to:

• Create strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

• Add pattern interrupts that increase watch time

• Use captions that feel native, not templated

• Edit for retention, not just aesthetics

• Repurpose long-form content into high-performing short clips



About the Role:



We produce 40–60 Instagram reels per month in the real estate and investing space. The content is direct, strategic, and authority-driven. Your job is to make it scroll-stopping and clean.



You will be:

• Cutting studio footage

• Editing studio and field content

• Tightening pacing

• Adding dynamic captions

• Adding light motion graphics when appropriate

• Elevating overall production quality



Requirements:



• 3+ years editing short-form content

• Strong understanding of Instagram-native editing

• Fluent English communication

• Ability to handle 40–60 reels per month consistently

• Fast turnaround times



To Apply:



Send 3 of your best short-form edits. Not your cleanest. Your most engaging.

Tell me how many high-quality reels you can produce per day and per week.

Tell me your expected monthly pay.

In one paragraph, explain how you increase retention in the first 5 seconds of a reel.

Low-effort applications will be ignored.

If you’re elite, this will be long-term.

title: Bookkeeper – Real Estate & Senior Living
description:
How to Apply

Please submit: 



Job Description – Bookkeeper (Real Estate & Senior Living Focus)

Job Title: Bookkeeper – Real Estate & Senior Living

Location: Remote

Hours: Full-time; 40 hours with at least 6 hours each day overlapping with Eastern Timezone

Compensation: Starting pay: $8-10/hour (hourly contractor role) depending on experience

Pay model: Moves to a weekly salary after a successful 90-day review

Quarterly merit-based bonuses: Up to the equivalent of 1 week’s pay per quarter if key performance indicators (on-time task completion, accuracy, team attitude, and participation) are met

13th month bonus included (standard for full-time overseas hires)



About Us

At Thrive Bookkeeping LLC, our mission is to deliver specialized bookkeeping for real estate investors, property managers, and senior living businesses. Using proven systems and a diagnostic-first approach, we bring clarity and confidence to messy books so clients can focus on growth.



We live by our values:

Excellence – Accuracy, proactive communication, and thorough preparation.

Discipline – Consistency, accountability, and respecting boundaries (no weekend work unless approved).

Alignment – Clear SOPs and shared goals across clients and team.

Ambition – Supporting client growth while building freedom and profitability.

Impact – Helping businesses thrive by giving them clarity and confidence in their numbers.



We’re not just balancing books—we’re empowering clients with the clarity to expand properties, open new facilities, and scale sustainably.



Responsibilities

As a bookkeeper with Thrive Bookkeeping, you will be responsible for:

Managing day-to-day bookkeeping for real estate investors, property managers, and senior living facilities.





Reconciling bank and credit card accounts.

Handling accounts payable/receivable, payroll support, and sales tax filings as assigned.

Building and maintaining a clean chart of accounts.

Producing accurate monthly financial reports and ensuring they are delivered on schedule.

Supporting client onboarding with account connections in QBO, Keeper, and related systems.

Collaborating with the account manager and team through Slack, Asana, and Notion.

Ensuring compliance with deadlines and bookkeeping best practices.

Participating in cleanups and diagnostics when needed.



Qualifications

We’re looking for someone with:

At least three years of U.S.-based professional bookkeeping experience.





Two years working with real estate, property management, or service-based businesses (preferred).





Proficiency in QuickBooks Online, Keeper, Asana, Slack, and Google Workspace.





Strong knowledge of GAAP and best bookkeeping practices.





Preferred: QBO ProAdvisor certification.





Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.





Strong communication and client-facing ability.





Traits we value: proactive, solutions-oriented, team player, systems thinker.







Work Style & Culture Fit

Comfortable working independently while collaborating closely with an account manager.





Able to manage multiple clients, entities, and deadlines.





Values accuracy, clarity, and proactive communication.





Aligns with our belief: financial empowerment comes from giving clients clarity, not confusion.



Why Work With Us

Flexible remote work.





Growth opportunities with a firm scaling toward a sellable business model.





Quarterly KPI-based bonuses (profitability, timeliness, accuracy).





Chance to help entrepreneurs, investors, and senior living leaders grow wealth and operate confidently.



Our Policy on AI Tools

We recognize that AI and translation tools are widely used by virtual assistants and remote professionals. We believe in being clear about what is acceptable and what is not for this role and interview process:

? Allowed & Encouraged

Using AI for drafting, brainstorming, or improving written communication 
s, SOPs, checklists, documentation).





Using AI to check grammar, spelling, or tone for clarity.





Using AI to speed up repetitive tasks or improve efficiency.





Using captions or transcription tools as a support to follow along in meetings.

?? Limited / Not a Fit

Relying on translation tools for all real-time communication in English. This role requires strong listening comprehension and verbal English without constant translation.





Submitting AI-generated work without editing or adding your own input (we want your human judgment + expertise).





Hiding the use of AI when asked about your process.

???? What to Expect in Hiring

We will analyze written and verbal responses for AI-only content.





Interviews will assess live comprehension (your ability to follow spoken English in real time).





We don’t mind if you use supportive tools during the process — but we need to know you can communicate clearly and independently when the role requires it.



How to Apply

Please submit:
